rows.original: Knocked off balance from the blitz of attacks unleashed by [party.som |you |you and your ally |you and your allies ], the Stone Titan staggers backwards, stumbling. Pitching backwards as its footing is lost, its 'head' slams into the side of the canyon, and the cliffs surrounding you begin to rumble as it strikes the ground with a deafening impact. You're captivated by the sight for a few seconds, until you realize just what's about to happen, and survival instincts hijack your nerves; turning on a heel, you begin to run for your life! It's not a moment too soon, either — a boulder easily the size of a minotaur slams into the ground where you were standing mere moments before, with several more hot behind it. Enormous impacts thud all around you, the cliff face amplifying the echoes into an earsplitting noise. Retreating to a safe distance, [party.yall] watch in a mixture of awe and horror as the titanic elemental is buried under a literal landslide of stone, clouds of dust and dirt blanketing the area from the hundreds of tons of rock crashing to the ground. The spectacle continues on for several minutes, as the force of all that stone impacts the ground with enough power to trigger small aftershocks, the cycle producing an endless number of dull, droning thuds of stone smashing against stone. [ashe.around |Ashe hums with triumph, clearly relishing in her vengeance. | ] It isn't until the dust finally begins to settle that you're able to behold the shattered remains of the elemental's patchwork body... and the dozens, no, hundreds of gleaming gemstones within the shattered rocks. You don't need to be a genius to tell that there's a lot of lucre there. You're so distracted by the sight of all the glittering gems that you scarcely notice something bumping against your [pc.feet]. Glancing down, you spot a fist-sized, perfectly spherical orange gemstone that's managed to roll into you; odd, to say the least. Picking up the strangely-perfect stone, you inspect it briefly. [pc.bgMulti scholar noblescion |If you had to guess, it's probably a piece of corundum, or maybe garnet |It resembles a sort of sapphire, but the cut and color are unlike any you've seen |It's an orange, hard gemstone of some sort, but you're not sure what ]. You're about to pocket the sphere when it suddenly flashes brightly, an arcane hum filling the air! ÜN. What the hell?! Since when does an elemental's core stay active?! Let alone one so small? You're about to toss it before you realize it actually... isn't doing anything. The blinding amber flash has settled down to a faint orange glow, focused onto you; the core's soft hum feels almost like a cat's purr. [pc.isMage |Is it... happy? |What in the world... it seems harmless enough, though. ] Whatever the case, perhaps against your better judgment, you place the core into your pack, [party.hasCompanions |disregarding the aghast stare[party.manyCompanions |s | ] of your companion[party.manyCompanions |s | ]. |continuing on your way. ]
rows.translation: 在接连不断的攻击之下，他彻底失去了平衡。 [party.som |你 |你和你的盟友 |你和你的盟友们 ]石巨兽踉跄着向后倒去，脚步不稳。当它失去平衡向后倾倒时，它的“头部”撞在了峡谷的侧壁上，周围的悬崖开始震动，因为它重重地摔在了地上，发出了震耳欲聋的巨响。 你被这一幕吸引住了几秒钟，直到你意识到即将发生什么，生存本能立刻控制了你的神经；你立刻转身开始拼命奔跑！ 这一刻来得再及时也不为过——一块至少有米诺陶尔那么大的巨石重重地砸在了你刚才站立的地方，紧接着还有几块类似的巨石接连坠落。 巨大的冲击波在四周回荡，悬崖峭壁将这些声响放大，形成震耳欲聋的噪音。你赶紧退到安全的地方。 [party.yall] 人们怀着敬畏与恐惧的心情，目睹那巨大的元素生物被数以百吨计的岩石彻底掩埋——滚滚的石块、尘土与污垢笼罩了整个区域。这一幕持续了数分钟，所有那些岩石撞击地面的力量足以引发轻微的余震，这种循环不断地产生着无数沉闷、连续不断的震动声。 砰的一声石头撞击石头的声音。 [ashe.around |艾什得意地哼着小曲，显然正在享受自己的复仇所带来的快感。 | ] 直到尘埃终于开始落定，你才能够看到那个由各种元素构成的身体所留下的残骸……还有那些数不胜数的…… 数百 那些破碎的岩石中镶嵌着闪闪发光的宝石。不用费什么心思就能看出，这里肯定藏着什么…… 很多 那些闪闪发光的宝石实在让人分心，以至于你几乎没注意到有什么东西撞到了你…… [pc.feet]低头一看，你发现了一颗拳头大小、形状完美的橙色宝石，它竟然滚到了你的面前；至少可以说，这真是件奇怪的事。 你捡起这块形状如此完美的宝石，仔细地观察了起来。 [pc.bgMulti scholar noblescion |如果你非得猜的话，那很可能是一块刚玉，或者也可能是石榴石。 |它看起来有点像蓝宝石，但它的切割工艺和颜色与你见过的任何蓝宝石都不一样。 |这是一种橙色的、坚硬的宝石，但你并不确定它具体属于哪种宝石。 ]就在你即将将那个球体收入囊中的时候，它突然发出了耀眼的光芒，空气中充满了神秘的嗡鸣声！ ÜN. 搞什么鬼？！从什么时候起，元素核心会一直处于活跃状态了？！更何况还是这么小的一个核心……你差点就把它扔掉了，却没发现它其实……什么反应都没有。那原本刺眼的琥珀色光芒现在已经变成了微弱的橙色光晕，一直聚焦在你身上；而那个核心发出的轻微嗡鸣声，听起来简直就像猫在轻轻呼噜。 [pc.isMage |这是……吗？ 开心吗？ |这到底是怎么回事……不过看起来倒也没什么危害。 ] 无论如何，也许违背了你的本意，你还是把那个核心部件放进了背包里。 [party.hasCompanions |无视那些惊恐的目光[party.manyCompanions |s | ] 你的同伴[party.manyCompanions |s | ]. |继续你的旅程吧。 ]
rows.raw: " Knocked off balance from the blitz of attacks unleashed by [party.som |you |you and your ally |you and your allies ], the Stone Titan staggers backwards, stumbling. Pitching backwards as its footing is lost, its 'head' slams into the side of the canyon, and the cliffs surrounding you begin to rumble as it strikes the ground with a deafening impact. You're captivated by the sight for a few seconds, until you realize just what's about to happen, and survival instincts hijack your nerves; turning on a heel, you begin to run for your life! It's not a moment too soon, either — a boulder easily the size of a minotaur slams into the ground where you were standing mere moments before, with several more hot behind it. Enormous impacts thud all around you, the cliff face amplifying the echoes into an earsplitting noise. Retreating to a safe distance, [party.yall] watch in a mixture of awe and horror as the titanic elemental is buried under a literal landslide of stone, clouds of dust and dirt blanketing the area from the hundreds of tons of rock crashing to the ground. The spectacle continues on for several minutes, as the force of all that stone impacts the ground with enough power to trigger small aftershocks, the cycle producing an endless number of dull, droning thuds of stone smashing against stone. [ashe.around |Ashe hums with triumph, clearly relishing in her vengeance. | ] It isn't until the dust finally begins to settle that you're able to behold the shattered remains of the elemental's patchwork body... and the dozens, no, hundreds of gleaming gemstones within the shattered rocks. You don't need to be a genius to tell that there's a lot of lucre there. You're so distracted by the sight of all the glittering gems that you scarcely notice something bumping against your [pc.feet]. Glancing down, you spot a fist-sized, perfectly spherical orange gemstone that's managed to roll into you; odd, to say the least. Picking up the strangely-perfect stone, you inspect it briefly. [pc.bgMulti scholar noblescion |If you had to guess, it's probably a piece of corundum, or maybe garnet |It resembles a sort of sapphire, but the cut and color are unlike any you've seen |It's an orange, hard gemstone of some sort, but you're not sure what ]. You're about to pocket the sphere when it suddenly flashes brightly, an arcane hum filling the air! ÜN. What the hell?! Since when does an elemental's core stay active?! Let alone one so small? You're about to toss it before you realize it actually... isn't doing anything. The blinding amber flash has settled down to a faint orange glow, focused onto you; the core's soft hum feels almost like a cat's purr. [pc.isMage |Is it... happy? |What in the world... it seems harmless enough, though. ] Whatever the case, perhaps against your better judgment, you place the core into your pack, [party.hasCompanions |disregarding the aghast stare[party.manyCompanions |s | ] of your companion[party.manyCompanions |s | ]. |continuing on your way. ] "

rows.original: Knocked down by the enormous elemental's brutal power, you look upwards at the looming powerhouse in terror, dreading what comes next. Three rhythmic pulses shake the ground around you, the towering titan leaning down from above you but not attacking. ÜN ÜN ÜN You wince, expecting to be crushed, but nothing happens. The colossal being does nothing of the sort — instead, there's a low hum as it smashes its arms against the ground beside you in a frightening display of strength. Despite your panic, no harm befalls you... at least for now. Taking the brief respite to jump to your feet, you run away from [silly |Reggie |the Stone Titan ] before it changes its mind about letting you go. Appearing content with your decision to flee, the titan returns to its normal position, before leaning backwards and unleashing an enormous, amber-colored beam of energy into the sky, parting the clouds above it with its sheer force! ÜÜÜÜÜRRRREEEEEGGG ÜN ÜN ÜN That's one hell of a warning shot! Collecting your bearings, you keep a safe distance from the enormous elemental; it makes no effort to pursue you, and soon resumes aimlessly wandering around the vale.
rows.translation: 被那股强大的元素力量击倒后，你惊恐地抬头望着那耸立在眼前的庞然巨物，心中充满了对接下来会发生什么的恐惧。三阵有节奏的震动不断摇晃着你周围的地面，那高大的泰坦从上方俯视着你，但却并没有发动攻击。 ÜN ÜN ÜN 你不由得缩了缩脖子，以为自己会被压扁，但实际上什么也没有发生。那个巨大的生物并没有对你采取任何行动——相反，它只是将手臂重重地砸在你身旁的地上，发出低沉的声响，展示着它惊人的力量。尽管你非常恐慌，但至少目前你并没有受到任何伤害。趁着这个短暂的喘息机会，你迅速站起身来，开始逃跑…… [silly |雷吉 |石之泰坦 ] 在它改变主意不再放你走之前。 随着你决定逃跑这一消息的出现，那座巨石重新回到了原来的位置，然后向后仰去，释放出一道巨大的、琥珀色的能量光束，这道光束的力量如此强大，以至于将上方的云层都撕裂开了！ 呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜 那真是一记相当有效的警告！你稳住阵脚，与那个巨大的元素生物保持安全距离；它并没有试图追击你，很快又继续在山谷中漫无目的地游荡起来。
rows.raw: " Knocked down by the enormous elemental's brutal power, you look upwards at the looming powerhouse in terror, dreading what comes next. Three rhythmic pulses shake the ground around you, the towering titan leaning down from above you but not attacking. ÜN ÜN ÜN You wince, expecting to be crushed, but nothing happens. The colossal being does nothing of the sort — instead, there's a low hum as it smashes its arms against the ground beside you in a frightening display of strength. Despite your panic, no harm befalls you... at least for now. Taking the brief respite to jump to your feet, you run away from [silly |Reggie |the Stone Titan ] before it changes its mind about letting you go. Appearing content with your decision to flee, the titan returns to its normal position, before leaning backwards and unleashing an enormous, amber-colored beam of energy into the sky, parting the clouds above it with its sheer force! ÜÜÜÜÜRRRREEEEEGGG ÜN ÜN ÜN That's one hell of a warning shot! Collecting your bearings, you keep a safe distance from the enormous elemental; it makes no effort to pursue you, and soon resumes aimlessly wandering around the vale. "

rows.original: Deciding that taking down this lithological bruiser isn't in your best interests at the moment, you turn tail and flee. [silly |Reggie |The Stone Titan ] makes no effort to pursue you, its orange eye remaining locked onto you as you make your escape. Appearing to be satisfied with the distance you're putting between the two of you, it leans back and roars triumphantly, firing an amber beam of energy skywards, either in warning or celebration. ÜÜÜÜÜRRRREEEEEGGG!
rows.translation: 你意识到，目前对付这个岩石系强者并不是你的最佳选择，于是转身逃走了。 [silly |雷吉 |石之泰坦 ] 它并没有试图追上你，在你逃跑的过程中，它的橙色眼睛始终紧盯着你。似乎对你与它之间的距离感到满意，它向后仰去，发出胜利的咆哮，同时向天空射出一道琥珀色的能量光束，这可能是在警告你，也可能是在庆祝它的胜利。 呜呜呜呜呜呜呜！
rows.raw: " Deciding that taking down this lithological bruiser isn't in your best interests at the moment, you turn tail and flee. [silly |Reggie |The Stone Titan ] makes no effort to pursue you, its orange eye remaining locked onto you as you make your escape. Appearing to be satisfied with the distance you're putting between the two of you, it leans back and roars triumphantly, firing an amber beam of energy skywards, either in warning or celebration. ÜÜÜÜÜRRRREEEEEGGG! "

rows.original: Deciding you no longer see a use for the core you acquired from [silly |Reggie |the Stone Titan ], you drop it from your belongings, continuing on your way. A small tremor has you turning back, half-expecting a fight... only to see several small cobbles and pebbles aggregating together around the spherical core, forming into a vaguely bipedal shape.[silly | Continuing to accrete rocks, several smaller ones form into the shape of a miniature brimmed hat and briefcase held in one hand. | ] Looking like a much smaller version of the titanic stone monstrosity you initially encountered, the downsized elemental about-faces, its stumpy little legs carrying it off into the distance at a leisurely pace. Guess he's off to do his own thing... [ashe.around |Ashe noticeably shakes with some mixture of bewilderment and anger, clearly surprised at the core's ambulatory nature. "He... He can do that? Why can he do that? [silly |This is outrageous, it's unfair! |How does he– ]" Her anger is cut short by an annoyed scoff, clearly deciding to simmer in jealous surprise. "Stupid damned rock..." | ]
rows.translation: 当你认为自己已经不再需要从某处获得的那颗核心部件时…… [silly |雷吉 |石之泰坦 ]你从随身物品中拿出了那个东西，然后继续前行。突然，一阵轻微的震动让你转过头去，你半期待着会发生一场争斗……结果却看到，几颗小鹅卵石和碎石在那个球形物体的周围聚集在一起，逐渐形成了一个有点像两足生物的形状。[silly | 随着不断堆积岩石，几块较小的岩石最终组合成了一个形状类似于迷你宽边帽和公文包的构造，整个结构被一只手握住。 | ] 看起来就像是你最初遇到的那种巨大石质怪物的缩小版，这个体型缩小的元素生物，用它那短粗的小腿悠闲地朝远处走去。 看来它是要去忙它自己的事情了…… [ashe.around |阿什明显地因为困惑与愤怒而颤抖着，对于这个核心竟然能够移动这一点，他显然感到非常惊讶。“他……他居然能移动？ 做 那个？他为什么能那么做？ [silly |这太离谱了，太不公平了！ |他到底是怎么做到的—— ]她的怒火被一声恼怒的嘲笑打断了，显然，她决定把这份嫉妒和惊讶藏在心里。“该死的石头…… | ]
rows.raw: ' Deciding you no longer see a use for the core you acquired from [silly |Reggie |the Stone Titan ], you drop it from your belongings, continuing on your way. A small tremor has you turning back, half-expecting a fight... only to see several small cobbles and pebbles aggregating together around the spherical core, forming into a vaguely bipedal shape.[silly | Continuing to accrete rocks, several smaller ones form into the shape of a miniature brimmed hat and briefcase held in one hand. | ] Looking like a much smaller version of the titanic stone monstrosity you initially encountered, the downsized elemental about-faces, its stumpy little legs carrying it off into the distance at a leisurely pace. Guess he's off to do his own thing... [ashe.around |Ashe noticeably shakes with some mixture of bewilderment and anger, clearly surprised at the core's ambulatory nature. "He... He can do that? Why can he do that? [silly |This is outrageous, it's unfair! |How does he– ]" Her anger is cut short by an annoyed scoff, clearly deciding to simmer in jealous surprise. "Stupid damned rock..." | ] '

rows.original:
Off to the side, you can see the sad remains of a wooden ox-cart, one of many laggards that never quite made it to the city when the evacuation order came down to the coastlands. Shattered ceramics surround the toppled conveyance, old enough now that even flies aren't gathering around them; whatever foodstuff might have been carried along has long since been looted. At least there's no evidence of blood — the beasts of burden might have gotten away in the confusion.
    
    There's always a chance there might be something worthwhile left behind, though. [pc.isCunning
        |Or that somebody's watching this wreck in the hopes of someone like you letting their guard down.
    ]
rows.translation:
在旁边，你可以看到那辆木制牛车的残骸——在疏散命令下达后，有许多这样的车辆没能及时赶到城市。破碎的陶瓷碎片散落在倒塌的车辆周围，这些碎片已经陈旧到连苍蝇都不会在它们旁边聚集；那些原本可能被运载在车辆上的食物，早就被抢走了。 至少没有发现任何血迹——那些驮兽可能是在混乱中逃走了。

不过，还是有可能留下一些有价值的东西的。 [pc.isCunning
        |或者，有人正在观察这一混乱局面，希望像你这样的人会放松警惕。
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    Off to the side, you can see the sad remains of a wooden ox-cart, one of many laggards that never quite made it to the city when the evacuation order came down to the coastlands. Shattered ceramics surround the toppled conveyance, old enough now that even flies aren't gathering around them; whatever foodstuff might have been carried along has long since been looted. At least there's no evidence of blood — the beasts of burden might have gotten away in the confusion.
    
    There's always a chance there might be something worthwhile left behind, though. [pc.isCunning
        |Or that somebody's watching this wreck in the hopes of someone like you letting their guard down.
    ]
	"

rows.original: Could be something worth taking here, if you're lucky.
rows.translation: 如果你运气好的话，这里可能会有值得获取的东西。
rows.raw: "Could be something worth taking here, if you're lucky."

rows.original: [var0 |But the way the cart was knocked over did create a bit of a blind spot between wood and stone, and you[pc.isBimbo |'re just lucky enough |'ve got a keen enough gaze ] to spot it! A single small wooden lockbox has managed to go unnoticed all this time. You pull it free and open it up, revealing [var1 |a few sprigs of Winterstem |several bottles of Brazenberry Ale |several philters filled with bubbling Conjurer's Concotions |several bottles of Bovum Sherry |a few bolts of Spider Silk |a trio of beautiful crimson Blazingstones ]. A fair find indeed! |As you squat down to examine the wreckage, you notice something shiny still in the wreck, just out of easy reach. You sigh and get low to the ground, reaching your arm deep into the wreck to try and pluck it up. Whatever it is, it's cold and smooth... a coin? One single damned coin? You'd laugh, if someone nearby wasn't doing it for you. You glance up from the wreck in time to see shadows falling over [party.som |you |you and [comp1.name] |your party ]. Though [dayNight |the sun's right in your eyes |it's pitch dark out ], you can still see the outline of a scaly woman crouching on the rocks overhead. A flickering flame burns on the tip of her sinuous tail, casting a warm glow over boiled leather armor hugging a slim, sun-darkened body. Around her, a number of other cloaked brigands begin to show themselves, a mix of local races carrying a ramshackle collection of scavenged weapons. "Get [party.som |[pc.himHer] |'em |'em ], gals!" the salamander snarls, leaping down before you can grab your weapon. ]
rows.translation: [var0 |但是，由于推车被撞倒的方式，木头和石头之间形成了一处视线盲区，而你……[pc.isBimbo |只是运气比较好而已。 |目光十分敏锐。 ] 看吧！这样一个小小的木制锁箱，竟然一直被人忽视了。你把它拔出来打开，里面竟然…… [var1 |几枝冬茎 |几瓶铜莓啤酒 |几个装满了冒着气泡的“魔术师调和液”的过滤器 |几瓶博文雪利酒 |几缕蜘蛛丝 |三颗美丽的深红色炽焰石 ]真是个意外的收获啊！ |当你蹲下来检查残骸时，你注意到了…… 某个东西 在废墟中依然闪闪发光，却偏偏够不着。你叹了口气，俯身将手臂伸进废墟里，试图把它拿出来。不管那是什么，它摸起来冰冷而光滑……是一枚硬币吗？就那么一枚该死的硬币？ 要是旁边没有别人也在这么做，你肯定会笑出来的。 你从废墟中抬起头，正好看到阴影正在悄然笼罩过来…… [party.som |你 |你和…… [comp1.name] |你的团队 ]. 虽然 [dayNight |阳光直射你的眼睛 |外面一片漆黑。 ]你仍然可以看到一个长满鳞片的女性蹲在头顶的岩石上的轮廓。她那弯曲的尾巴尖端燃烧着一簇跳动的火焰，温暖的光芒照射在她那紧贴着纤细、被阳光晒得黝黑的身躯上的煮熟皮革铠甲上。在她周围，其他一些披着斗篷的强盗们也开始显露身影——这些来自当地不同种族的人，手中拿着各式各样从废墟中捡来的武器。 “快走…… [party.som |[pc.himHer] |他们 |他们 ]姑娘们！”火蜥蜴咆哮着，趁你还没来得及拿起武器，就跳了下去。 ]
rows.raw: " [var0 |But the way the cart was knocked over did create a bit of a blind spot between wood and stone, and you[pc.isBimbo |'re just lucky enough |'ve got a keen enough gaze ] to spot it! A single small wooden lockbox has managed to go unnoticed all this time. You pull it free and open it up, revealing [var1 |a few sprigs of Winterstem |several bottles of Brazenberry Ale |several philters filled with bubbling Conjurer's Concotions |several bottles of Bovum Sherry |a few bolts of Spider Silk |a trio of beautiful crimson Blazingstones ]. A fair find indeed! |As you squat down to examine the wreckage, you notice something shiny still in the wreck, just out of easy reach. You sigh and get low to the ground, reaching your arm deep into the wreck to try and pluck it up. Whatever it is, it's cold and smooth... a coin? One single damned coin? You'd laugh, if someone nearby wasn't doing it for you. You glance up from the wreck in time to see shadows falling over [party.som |you |you and [comp1.name] |your party ]. Though [dayNight |the sun's right in your eyes |it's pitch dark out ], you can still see the outline of a scaly woman crouching on the rocks overhead. A flickering flame burns on the tip of her sinuous tail, casting a warm glow over boiled leather armor hugging a slim, sun-darkened body. Around her, a number of other cloaked brigands begin to show themselves, a mix of local races carrying a ramshackle collection of scavenged weapons. "Get [party.som |[pc.himHer] |'em |'em ], gals!" the salamander snarls, leaping down before you can grab your weapon. ] "

rows.original:
The last of the brigands collapses into a groaning heap on the ground, weapons falling from her hands. You loom over the group, kicking their blades away. 

	"Hey, hold on, let's not do anything hasty," the ringleader 'mander pleads. "We're just hungry..."
rows.translation:
最后一个强盗倒在地上，发出呻吟声，手中的武器也掉落在地。你站在他们上方，将他们的刀剑踢到一边。

“喂，等等，咱们先别冲动行事，”那个头目恳求道，“我们只是肚子饿了而已……
rows.raw:
'
    The last of the brigands collapses into a groaning heap on the ground, weapons falling from her hands. You loom over the group, kicking their blades away. 

	"Hey, hold on, let's not do anything hasty," the ringleader 'mander pleads. "We're just hungry..."
    '

rows.original: If they're so hungry, you suppose you could spare some food.
rows.translation: 如果他们这么饿，你大概可以分给他们一些食物吧。
rows.raw: "If they're so hungry, you suppose you could spare some food."

rows.original: You don't have anything to share! Times really are rough.
rows.translation: 你没什么可分享的吧！现在确实是个艰难的时期。
rows.raw: "You don't have anything to share! Times really are rough."

rows.original:
You shake your head and gesture for the brigands to get out of here. You have better things to do.

	"Th-thanks!" the salamander says, picking up one of her fallen comrades. "Come on, let's get out of here before [pc.heShe] changes [pc.hisHer] mind."
rows.translation:
你摇了摇头，示意那些强盗离开这里。你还有更重要的事情要做。

“谢、谢谢！”蝾螈说着，捡起了她倒下的同伴之一。“快，我们赶紧离开这里吧…… [pc.heShe] 更改 [pc.hisHer] 注意。
rows.raw:
'
	You shake your head and gesture for the brigands to get out of here. You have better things to do.

	"Th-thanks!" the salamander says, picking up one of her fallen comrades. "Come on, let's get out of here before [pc.heShe] changes [pc.hisHer] mind."
	'

rows.original:
You [pc.isDK|begrudgingly ]reach into your pack and take out some of the food you're carrying, and toss it to the reeling bandits. "Take it."

	The thieves hesitate, just a moment, before jumping on the bundle and tearing into it. "Th-thank you. You've got no idea how bad it is out here! We didn't have a choice..."
	
	You've heard that one before. "Just stay out of trouble."
	
	"We will!" 
	
	You turn back towards the road and get walking, leaving the band to stuff their haggard faces.
rows.translation:
你 [pc.isDK|不情愿地 ]你从背包里拿出一些食物，扔给了那些饥肠辘辘的强盗们。“拿去吧。”

那些小偷犹豫了一下，但很快便抢过了食物开始狼吞虎咽。“谢谢你们……你们根本不知道这里的情况有多糟糕！我们真的别无选择……”

这种话你以前也听过吧：“最好别惹上麻烦。”

“我们一定会的！”

你转身继续往路上走，留下那些强盗们继续狼吞虎咽地吃着食物。
rows.raw:
'
    You [pc.isDK|begrudgingly ]reach into your pack and take out some of the food you're carrying, and toss it to the reeling bandits. "Take it."

	The thieves hesitate, just a moment, before jumping on the bundle and tearing into it. "Th-thank you. You've got no idea how bad it is out here! We didn't have a choice..."
	
	You've heard that one before. "Just stay out of trouble."
	
	"We will!" 
	
	You turn back towards the road and get walking, leaving the band to stuff their haggard faces.
    '

rows.original:
The bandits overwhelm you, throwing you to the ground with the sheer weight of their relentless attacks. The moment you're on the ground, the salamander bitch is on top of you, kicking your weapon away and grabbing your coinpurse. "[var0|Nice haul!" she grins, bouncing the weighty sack in her hand. "Very nice. This'll keep us fed for a while. Thanks for the donation, wayfarer."|Tsk! This is all you have?" she huffs, shaking the lightweight sack in her hand. "Damn it! Well, at least the fighting was fun! Better than fighting in the slave pits, anyway."]

	She blows you a kiss and takes off running, shortly followed by her compatriots.
rows.translation:
那些强盗以压倒性的力量将你击倒在地，他们连续不断的攻击让你根本无法反抗。一旦你倒下，那个该死的女蛇就会立刻压在你身上，踢飞你的武器，然后抢走你的钱袋。[var0|收获真丰富啊！”她笑着，手中晃动着那个沉重的袋子。“太好了，这些足够我们吃上好一阵子了。感谢这位路人的捐赠。|啧！就这些吗？”她哼了一声，摇晃着手中的那个轻便袋子。“该死！不过至少战斗过程还挺有趣的……总比在奴隶竞技场里打架要好吧。]

	她向你飞了一个吻，然后跑开了，她的同胞们也紧随其后。
rows.raw:
'
    The bandits overwhelm you, throwing you to the ground with the sheer weight of their relentless attacks. The moment you're on the ground, the salamander bitch is on top of you, kicking your weapon away and grabbing your coinpurse. "[var0|Nice haul!" she grins, bouncing the weighty sack in her hand. "Very nice. This'll keep us fed for a while. Thanks for the donation, wayfarer."|Tsk! This is all you have?" she huffs, shaking the lightweight sack in her hand. "Damn it! Well, at least the fighting was fun! Better than fighting in the slave pits, anyway."]

	She blows you a kiss and takes off running, shortly followed by her compatriots. 
    '

rows.original: You set off along one of the gullies, hoping to find a way forward that doesn't involve climbing up or down. The sheer cliff faces press in on you, limiting your options: the peaks are not kind to the grounded, and what few paths there are all seem to be nudging you in a single direction... You have discovered a new passage.
rows.translation: 你沿着其中一条沟壑前进，希望能找到一条不需要上下攀爬的出路。陡峭的悬崖壁紧紧压迫着你，限制了你的选择：这些山峰对那些无法攀登的人来说实在太过险恶，而为数不多的几条路径似乎都在将你引向同一个方向…… 你发现了一条新的通道。
rows.raw: " You set off along one of the gullies, hoping to find a way forward that doesn't involve climbing up or down. The sheer cliff faces press in on you, limiting your options: the peaks are not kind to the grounded, and what few paths there are all seem to be nudging you in a single direction... You have discovered a new passage."

rows.original: Wind your way back through the Undermountain to the city of Khor'minos.
rows.translation: 绕道穿过幽暗山脉，最终抵达霍尔米诺斯城。
rows.raw: "Wind your way back through the Undermountain to the city of Khor'minos."

rows.original:
A wooden sign nailed to the cave wall here proudly announces "COME IN FRIENDSHIP TO ELTHA VILLAS, THE SEA VIEW FROM THE STONE."
    
    Despite the signposting, there's no hint of daylight from the streets here, just the soft glow of fungal lamps through open windows in a single estate at the end of the street, the largest of them all. [var0
        |Vrannus's estate appears to be the only one currently occupied at all, and even it has half its windows dark
        |Only that single estate actually seems to be occupied, and even then half its windows are dark
    ]. A single guard is posted at the door, wearing the deep red and purple of the Chargers. 
    
    In the middle of villas stands a statue of a minotaur man dressed in a toga, holding up a pair of scales — whether they're meant to be a symbol of justice, or a nod to the merchant's bazaar on the same street, is anyone's guess. Either way, atop the scales is a [flags.WAY_ELTHA
        |glowing blue Waystone.
        |faded blue gem, the same color as your Waystone Charm. It calls to you...
    ]
rows.translation:
一块木制招牌被钉在洞穴的墙壁上，上面骄傲地写着：“欢迎来到埃尔萨别墅，从那块石头上，您可以欣赏到海景。”

尽管有这样的指示牌，但这条街道上却看不到一丝日光，只有街道尽头那座最大的宅邸中，透过敞开的窗户，才能看到真菌灯发出的柔和光芒。 [var0
        |瓦兰努斯的宅邸似乎是目前唯一有人居住的场所，但就连那里也有半数的窗户处于关闭状态。
        |似乎只有那栋房子真正有人居住，但即便如此，它有一半的窗户仍然是关着的。
    ]门口只有一名卫兵站岗，他穿着充电器队标志性的深红色和紫色制服。

在别墅群的中心，矗立着一座弥诺陶洛斯人的雕像。这个雕像穿着托加袍，手中举着一把天平——这些象征究竟是代表着正义，还是对同一条街上商贩集市的致敬，恐怕只有天知道了。无论如何，在那把天平的顶端…… [flags.WAY_ELTHA
        |发光的蓝色路标。
        |那颗褪色的蓝色宝石，颜色与你手中的路标护身符相同。它在召唤着你……
    ]
rows.raw:
"
    A wooden sign nailed to the cave wall here proudly announces "COME IN FRIENDSHIP TO ELTHA VILLAS, THE SEA VIEW FROM THE STONE."
    
    Despite the signposting, there's no hint of daylight from the streets here, just the soft glow of fungal lamps through open windows in a single estate at the end of the street, the largest of them all. [var0
        |Vrannus's estate appears to be the only one currently occupied at all, and even it has half its windows dark
        |Only that single estate actually seems to be occupied, and even then half its windows are dark
    ]. A single guard is posted at the door, wearing the deep red and purple of the Chargers. 
    
    In the middle of villas stands a statue of a minotaur man dressed in a toga, holding up a pair of scales — whether they're meant to be a symbol of justice, or a nod to the merchant's bazaar on the same street, is anyone's guess. Either way, atop the scales is a [flags.WAY_ELTHA
        |glowing blue Waystone.
        |faded blue gem, the same color as your Waystone Charm. It calls to you...
    ]
    "

rows.original:
You clasp the amulet around your neck and approach the towering minotaur statue, holding the blue-hued gem up towards that which adorns his judicial scales. There are only a scant few people out and about here, servants scurrying from [var0|Vrannus's estate|the single large estate that still seems to be occupied]. They make a point of ignoring you, eyes downcast, as you close with the idol amidst the villas.

        A thick, heavy pressure builds in the air with every step. Power surges within and around you, drawn forth from your charm and into the long-dormant gem. 
        
        Just as quickly as it began, though, that charge snaps into a crack of power. The Waystone idol glows, shining an effervescent azure across the villa square. Those servants still around gasp and scatter, terrified by anything resembling magic so soon after the siege has lifted.
rows.translation:
你将护身符挂在脖子上，然后走向那座高耸的米诺陶洛斯雕像，将那颗蓝色宝石举向雕像上那象征公正的天平。这里外出的行人寥寥无几，只有仆人们来来去去地忙碌着…… [var0|瓦兰努斯的庄园|那座似乎仍然有人居住的巨大宅邸]当你带着那尊神像穿过那些别墅时，他们故意无视你，目光低垂着。

每走一步，空气中都会弥漫着一种沉重的气息。你的身上以及周围，都涌动着力量——这些力量源自你的魅力，也被引入了那颗已经沉睡了许久的宝石之中。 
        
        然而，这种能量释放仅仅持续了短暂的时间，便迅速消散了。那块路标神像开始发光，一道璀璨的蔚蓝色光芒洒满了别墅前的广场。那些还在现场的仆从们看到这一幕，吓得惊呼着四散奔逃——在围城刚刚解除之后，任何与魔法相关的现象都会让他们感到恐惧。
rows.raw:
"
        You clasp the amulet around your neck and approach the towering minotaur statue, holding the blue-hued gem up towards that which adorns his judicial scales. There are only a scant few people out and about here, servants scurrying from [var0|Vrannus's estate|the single large estate that still seems to be occupied]. They make a point of ignoring you, eyes downcast, as you close with the idol amidst the villas.

        A thick, heavy pressure builds in the air with every step. Power surges within and around you, drawn forth from your charm and into the long-dormant gem. 
        
        Just as quickly as it began, though, that charge snaps into a crack of power. The Waystone idol glows, shining an effervescent azure across the villa square. Those servants still around gasp and scatter, terrified by anything resembling magic so soon after the siege has lifted."

rows.original: See if you can track down somebody to run the lift here in the villa.
rows.translation: 看看能不能找到人来操作别墅里的电梯。
rows.raw: "See if you can track down somebody to run the lift here in the villa."

rows.original: Take the lift down to the bottom of the cliffs.
rows.translation: 乘坐电梯下到悬崖的底部。
rows.raw: "Take the lift down to the bottom of the cliffs."

rows.original: Hey look, a herd of goats, and pretty strong ones by the look of them! If you could herd them towards the lift house, they might be able to help you out...
rows.translation: 看，有一群山羊，而且看起来它们还相当强壮！如果你能把它们赶到升降机那里，它们或许能帮上你的忙……
rows.raw: "Hey look, a herd of goats, and pretty strong ones by the look of them! If you could herd them towards the lift house, they might be able to help you out..."

rows.original: You need some pack animals and a lot of heavy duty rope to fix this thing.
rows.translation: 你需要一些驮畜以及大量结实的绳子来修理这个东西。
rows.raw: "You need some pack animals and a lot of heavy duty rope to fix this thing."

rows.original: Take the lift up to the top of the cliffs.
rows.translation: 乘坐电梯登上悬崖的顶部。
rows.raw: "Take the lift up to the top of the cliffs."

rows.original: Ahead of you, the caves finally give way to the open road, and the plummeting divide between kingdom and coast. From here you can see old stones, now largely broken by the wear of centuries, meandering north along the sheer white cliff, only to turn around and come back your way at a downward angle. Over hundreds upon hundreds of yards, the road descends slow and sure towards the shore. To your immediate east, though, is a solid-looking structure made from stone and wood, right up on the edge of the cliff. A number of ropes are suspended from a pulley system in the structure's rafter, connected to a wheel that has harnesses for pack animals... but there's no sign of the beasts up here, nor the actual lift that they must have once serviced. You peer over the cliff's edge, down a smoothed section of white stone, to see there's another, roofless structure at the bottom. The ropes connect place to place, but again, you see no sign of any life down there. Damn. There must be somebody in the villa that can get this working again, right?
rows.translation: 在前方，洞穴终于变成了开阔的道路，王国与海岸之间的陡峭分界线也清晰地展现在眼前。从这里可以看到那些古老的石块——经过几个世纪的风雨侵蚀，它们已经大多变得支离破碎——这些石块沿着陡峭的白色悬崖向北延伸，然后又折返，以倾斜的角度重新朝向你的方向延伸。 在长达数百码的路段中，这条道路缓缓而坚定地朝着海岸方向延伸。 然而，在你的正东方向，有一座由石头和木材建造的坚固建筑，它就建在悬崖的边缘。这座建筑的屋檐上安装了一套滑轮系统，几根绳子从这套系统中悬挂下来，这些绳子连接着一个轮子，而轮子上还装有用于驮运牲畜的背带。但是这里没有任何那些野兽的踪迹，也没有他们曾经使用过的升降设备。 你俯身看向悬崖边缘，顺着那一段光滑的白色岩石往下看，发现底部还有另一座没有屋顶的建筑。 这些绳子将各个地方连接在一起，但再次确认，下面依然没有任何生命的迹象。 该死。 别墅里肯定有人能够让这个东西重新恢复正常运作，对吧？
rows.raw: " Ahead of you, the caves finally give way to the open road, and the plummeting divide between kingdom and coast. From here you can see old stones, now largely broken by the wear of centuries, meandering north along the sheer white cliff, only to turn around and come back your way at a downward angle. Over hundreds upon hundreds of yards, the road descends slow and sure towards the shore. To your immediate east, though, is a solid-looking structure made from stone and wood, right up on the edge of the cliff. A number of ropes are suspended from a pulley system in the structure's rafter, connected to a wheel that has harnesses for pack animals... but there's no sign of the beasts up here, nor the actual lift that they must have once serviced. You peer over the cliff's edge, down a smoothed section of white stone, to see there's another, roofless structure at the bottom. The ropes connect place to place, but again, you see no sign of any life down there. Damn. There must be somebody in the villa that can get this working again, right? "

rows.original:
There are a few servants and merchants still here, under the protection of the dozens of soldiers posted at the barricades, but the villa's hardly the bustling hub it once was. Homes stand empty on either side of the street, dark and silent, occupied only by rats and wild dogs.
    
    "Hey!" you say, catching a passing cowgirl's arm. "Do you know anyone who can work the lift outside?"
    
    She looks at you [pc.isBimbo
        |for a moment before deciding you aren't a threat, and sighs. "I don't, sorry."
        |like you're about to rip her head off. "No! Leave me alone!"
    ] She hurries away before you have the chance for a follow-up.
    
    The next two cows aren't any more helpful. The people here are scared, timid in the face of strangers. You can only imagine what they've been through, living so close to the surface during the siege. 
    
    Fourth try is the charm, of a sort. You find a salamander boy, barely a man, sitting in the dark alley between two houses, illuminated only by the flicker of his own tail. When you ask him the same question as the cows, he lifts his head slowly, looking at you from under a mop of disheveled red hair. "Yeah, me," he grunts. "My pa was the last lift master."
    
    Oh, well, that makes things easier. "Can you get it working again?"
    
    He shakes his head.
    
    "Can I?"
    
    Another shake of his scruffy hair. "No. I mean, maybe? Somebody cut the ropes, and the demons freed all the animals. I found some of the goats from up here, but who knows where the ones from down-cliff went."
    
    "So I just need rope and... goats?"
    
    "Yeah, and then to go all the way down to the wheelhouse at the bottom of the cliff. But the only way down is the old road, and it's swarming with monsters, demons, and raiders. Nobody's been able to get through since the war started."
    
    Yeah, you'll see about that...
rows.translation:
这里还有些仆人和商人，他们在设置在路障旁的几十名士兵的保护下生活着，但这座别墅早已不复往日的繁华景象。街道两旁的房屋都空荡荡的，一片黑暗与寂静，只有老鼠和野狗在那里出没。

“嘿！”你叫住一个路过的牛仔女孩，抓住她的手臂问道：“你知道有没有人能操作外面的升降机吗？”

她看着你。 [pc.isBimbo
        |它犹豫了片刻，才决定你并不构成威胁，然后叹了口气说道：“不是的，抱歉。
        |你简直就像要拧下她的脑袋一样！”“不！别碰我！
    ] 在你还有机会继续追问之前，她就已经匆忙离开了。 
    
    第四次尝试，总会有些许运气。你在两栋房子之间的阴暗小巷里发现了一个男孩——他几乎还算不上是一个真正的男人，只有他自己尾巴的微光在照亮着周围。当你向他提出和那些奶牛一样的问题时，他缓缓抬起头，那一头乱蓬蓬的红发下，他的目光正注视着你。 是啊，就是我，”他哼了一声，“我爸是最后一位担任升降机操作员的。”

哦，这样倒省去了不少麻烦。“你能把它重新修好让它正常运行吗？”

他摇了摇头。

“那我能试试吗？”

他又一次摇动了自己那蓬乱的头发。 不，我的意思是，也许吧？有人割断了绳子，那些恶魔就把所有的动物都放跑了。我在这里上面找到了一些山羊，但那些在下面悬崖边的山羊去哪儿了，谁也不知道。”

“所以，我只需要一些绳子和……山羊就行了？
    
    没错，然后还要一路走到悬崖底部的船舱那里。但通往那里的唯一道路就是那条老路，而那条路上到处都是怪物、恶魔和掠夺者。自从战争开始以来，就再也没有人能够从那里通过。嗯，你就等着瞧吧……
rows.raw:
'
    There are a few servants and merchants still here, under the protection of the dozens of soldiers posted at the barricades, but the villa's hardly the bustling hub it once was. Homes stand empty on either side of the street, dark and silent, occupied only by rats and wild dogs.

        |for a moment before deciding you aren't a threat, and sighs. "I don't, sorry."
        |like you're about to rip her head off. "No! Leave me alone!"
    ] She hurries away before you have the chance for a follow-up.

rows.original: [pc.bg hunter barbarian |You've got plenty of experience with wild goats, but you've never had an excuse to try and shepherd a herd this big anywhere. This will be... interesting. You approach the animals slowly, giving them plenty of time to adjust to your presence. It takes the better part of an hour for the curious creatures to finally approach within [pc.isBimbo |petting |feeding ] range. Once you've got one, and that goat doesn't seem distressed with you [pc.isBimbo |scritching all over it's big, beardy face |offering it bits of food from your pack ], the rest of them begin to cautiously trot your way. "Good goat[pc.isBimbo |ies ]," you say, stroking one of their heads. A small kid trots up and headbutts your shin, bleating excitedly. [party.has cait |"Oh my gods," Cait squeals, picking the little goatlet up. "I love you!" ] It takes a couple of hours to wrangle them all, but it becomes clear pretty quick these were domestic animals at some point: they don't try to butt you or run when you slip collars of rope around them, and they fall in to follow you without complaint. You've got a herd of goats! [var0] |[pc.isBimbo |Your heart swells with excitement, seeing so many cute animals climbing all around the mountainside, merrily munching grass. "Ohhh, you're all so precious," you squeal, bouncing towards the herd with nothing but love in your heart. The goats are easily startled, but there's just something about you that calms them just as quickly. Before you know it, there's a whole herd of silky-furred friends prancing at your feet. They bleat and jump, rubbing your legs with their fuzzy heads, happy to be pet and hugged every which way. [party.has cait |"Oh my gods," Cait squeals, picking a little goatlet up. "I love you!" "I love them too!" you declare, picking up two baby goats under arms. "We're gonna take them with us!" Cait cheers. You cheer. The goats bleat excitedly. |"We've got to take you with us," you declare, picking up a pair of baby goats. "Come on!" The goats bleak excitedly and follow along. ] You've got a herd of goats! [var0] |You take a deep breath and survey the herd of goats scattered around the mountainside, wondering how the hell you're going to manage this. There's so many of them! Luckily you only need a few to manage the lift, right? Right. You take some rope out of your pack and tie it into something approximating a lasso, circling the pack as you go. There's a few ravines and culverts you might be able to scare the goats into, so you don't have to chase them all over the place, but then again they're clearly quite adept at climbing. Wrangling these creatures is going to take some effort... ] ]
rows.translation: [pc.bg hunter barbarian |你对野生山羊已经有丰富的经验了，但从来没有机会去尝试牧放这么大规模的羊群。这次体验肯定会……很有意思。你慢慢地靠近这些动物，给它们足够的时间来适应你的存在。过了差不多一个小时，这些充满好奇心的家伙才终于慢慢靠近你。 [pc.isBimbo |抚摸 |喂养 ] 范围。一旦你找到了这样一只山羊，而且它看起来也不会因为你而感到不安的话…… [pc.isBimbo |在它那又大又浓密的脸上到处都是抓痕。 |从你的背包里拿出食物来喂它。 ]其余的动物们开始小心翼翼地跟在你的后面走。 “好羊啊……[pc.isBimbo |ies ]这样吧，”你一边说着，一边轻抚着他们中的一个孩子的头。这时，一个小孩小跑过来，用头撞了你的胫骨一下，兴奋地叫着。 [party.has cait |天啊，”凯特惊呼着，抱起了那只小山羊。“我太爱你了！ ] 虽然需要花费几个小时的时间来处理它们，但很快就能弄清楚这些事情的来龙去脉了。 是 家养动物在某种程度上也是如此：当你给它们戴上项圈或用绳子拴住它们时，它们不会试图顶撞你，也不会在你拉扯它们的时候逃跑；而且它们会毫无怨言地跟着你。 你有一群山羊呢！ [var0] |[pc.isBimbo |看到这么多可爱的动物在山坡上欢快地吃着草，你的心里充满了兴奋。“哦，你们真是太可爱了！”你兴奋地叫着，满怀爱意地向那群动物跑去。 这些山羊很容易受到惊吓，但你有某种特质，能让它们立刻平静下来。不知不觉间，一大群毛茸茸的朋友就会在你脚边蹦跳着。它们会发出咩咩的叫声，用它们柔软的脑袋蹭你的腿，非常乐意让你抚摸和拥抱它们。 [party.has cait |天啊，”凯特惊呼道，抱起一只小山羊。“我太爱你了！” “我也爱它们！”你一边说，一边把两只小山羊抱在怀里，“我们一定要把它们带回去！” 凯特高兴地欢呼起来，你也跟着欢呼起来。那些小山羊则兴奋地咩咩叫着。 |我们必须带你一起走，”你一边说，一边抱起两只小山羊，“来吧！” 小山羊们兴奋地叫着，跟在了你后面。 ] 你有一群山羊呢！ [var0] |你深吸一口气，环顾那些散布在山腰上的山羊群，心中不禁疑惑：自己究竟要怎么才能应付这些家伙呢？它们的数量实在太多了！不过幸运的是，你只需要其中几只来操作升降机就行了，对吧？ 好的。你可以从背包里拿一些绳子，把它们绑成类似套索的形状，一边走一边把绳子绕在背包上。沿途会有一些沟壑和涵洞，你或许可以把山羊赶到那些地方去，这样就不用到处追它们了。不过，这些山羊显然非常擅长攀爬。 要想控制这些生物，确实需要花费一些功夫…… ] ]
rows.raw: ' [pc.bg hunter barbarian |You've got plenty of experience with wild goats, but you've never had an excuse to try and shepherd a herd this big anywhere. This will be... interesting. You approach the animals slowly, giving them plenty of time to adjust to your presence. It takes the better part of an hour for the curious creatures to finally approach within [pc.isBimbo |petting |feeding ] range. Once you've got one, and that goat doesn't seem distressed with you [pc.isBimbo |scritching all over it's big, beardy face |offering it bits of food from your pack ], the rest of them begin to cautiously trot your way. "Good goat[pc.isBimbo |ies ]," you say, stroking one of their heads. A small kid trots up and headbutts your shin, bleating excitedly. [party.has cait |"Oh my gods," Cait squeals, picking the little goatlet up. "I love you!" ] It takes a couple of hours to wrangle them all, but it becomes clear pretty quick these were domestic animals at some point: they don't try to butt you or run when you slip collars of rope around them, and they fall in to follow you without complaint. You've got a herd of goats! [var0] |[pc.isBimbo |Your heart swells with excitement, seeing so many cute animals climbing all around the mountainside, merrily munching grass. "Ohhh, you're all so precious," you squeal, bouncing towards the herd with nothing but love in your heart. The goats are easily startled, but there's just something about you that calms them just as quickly. Before you know it, there's a whole herd of silky-furred friends prancing at your feet. They bleat and jump, rubbing your legs with their fuzzy heads, happy to be pet and hugged every which way. [party.has cait |"Oh my gods," Cait squeals, picking a little goatlet up. "I love you!" "I love them too!" you declare, picking up two baby goats under arms. "We're gonna take them with us!" Cait cheers. You cheer. The goats bleat excitedly. |"We've got to take you with us," you declare, picking up a pair of baby goats. "Come on!" The goats bleak excitedly and follow along. ] You've got a herd of goats! [var0] |You take a deep breath and survey the herd of goats scattered around the mountainside, wondering how the hell you're going to manage this. There's so many of them! Luckily you only need a few to manage the lift, right? Right. You take some rope out of your pack and tie it into something approximating a lasso, circling the pack as you go. There's a few ravines and culverts you might be able to scare the goats into, so you don't have to chase them all over the place, but then again they're clearly quite adept at climbing. Wrangling these creatures is going to take some effort... ] ] '

rows.original: The last of the goats you've managed to corner flops over onto its side, panting hard. Poor guy. You take a breath and pick the rope back up. One by one, you loop it around the necks of the critters, securing them without choking them — they've had a bad enough of a day already. It takes a bit to get them back on their feet, now nice and safe in their leads, but they don't seem too much worse for wear. Indeed, you reckon they're probably from domestic stock in the first place, given that they seem used to being leashed. None of them choke themselves out trying to get away. You've got a herd of goats!
rows.translation: 你终于把那些山羊都逼到了角落里，其中最后一只倒在地上，喘着粗气。可怜的家伙…… 你深吸一口气，重新拿起绳子。你一根一根地把绳子套在这些动物的脖子上，把它们固定好，但并没有让它们窒息——它们今天已经经历了太多糟心事了。 让他们重新适应戴牵引绳的生活需要一些时间，但现在他们已经很好地适应了，而且看起来也没有受到太大的影响。事实上，你可能会觉得它们本来就是家养的，因为它们似乎已经习惯了被牵着走。 他们中没有一个人在试图逃跑的过程中窒息而死。 你有一群山羊呢！
rows.raw: " The last of the goats you've managed to corner flops over onto its side, panting hard. Poor guy. You take a breath and pick the rope back up. One by one, you loop it around the necks of the critters, securing them without choking them — they've had a bad enough of a day already. It takes a bit to get them back on their feet, now nice and safe in their leads, but they don't seem too much worse for wear. Indeed, you reckon they're probably from domestic stock in the first place, given that they seem used to being leashed. None of them choke themselves out trying to get away. You've got a herd of goats! "

rows.original:
Somehow, you manage to get the snot beaten out of you by a herd of goats.

    The sheer embarrassment of the realization almost makes the coming trampling a relief...
rows.translation:
不知怎么的，你被一群山羊揍得屁滚尿流。

当意识到这一事实时，那种尴尬感简直让人觉得，接下来被这些山羊踩在脚下反倒成了一种解脱……
rows.raw:
"
    Somehow, you manage to get the snot beaten out of you by a herd of goats.

    The sheer embarrassment of the realization almost makes the coming trampling a relief...
    "

rows.original: You approach the abandoned wheel house at the bottom of the cliffs, rope in hand and followed by an obedient herd of mountain goats. Getting the beasts hitched up is the easy part, as they're tame enough in your hands and there's a few bags of feed left sitting around to keep them occupied. But the rope... well, you've got to find a way to replace the rope connecting the wheelhouses together, with the lift itself in the middle. What's there at present is frayed to the point of snapping; in other places it's just been outright sliced by demonic vandals. Thankfully the worst of the damage stops just a short ways out of reach. You get the goats moving, have them rotate the ropes down a little so you can tie the replacement to the frayed ends, and then reverse them to send it right back up. You watch the new rope slowly ascend up the smooth cliff face, all the way to the other wheel house. Now you just need to go all the way back, and- You hear a bell ding next to you. There's another, smaller rope connect the two wheel houses, and this one's tied to a small brass bell tucked against the wall. You go to examine it, only to whip around again as the old lift rope plummets to the ground. Somebody's up there! "Yes!" You keep your goats working, hoisting the rest of the rope up to the other wheelhouse, and soon enough the other end's falling back to you, ready to be tied up to the lift. You finish up in a few moments, then step back and proudly behold your work. The clifftop and bottom are finally reconnected! You just need to ring the bell rope to get things moving.
rows.translation: 你手持绳子，带着一群听话的山羊，走向悬崖底部那座废弃的轮船小屋。让这些动物乖乖地跟在你后面其实并不难，因为它们在你手中已经变得相当温顺了，而且还剩下几袋饲料，可以用来让它们保持忙碌状态。 但是那根绳子……嗯，你得想办法替换掉那根连接两个驾驶室的绳子，让升降装置位于中间位置。目前这根绳子已经磨损得快要断裂了；而在其他地方，它则被那些破坏公物的家伙直接割断了。 幸运的是，最严重的损坏发生的地方距离你还有相当的距离。你让山羊们开始移动，让它们把绳子往下拉一点，这样你就可以把新的绳子绑在那些磨损的地方，然后再把绳子拉回去。你看着新的绳子缓缓地沿着光滑的悬崖面向上移动，一直到达另一个轮机舱。 现在你只需要一直往回走，然后—— 你听到旁边有铃声响起。还有一根较细的绳子将两个驾驶室连接在一起，而这根绳子被系在一面墙边的一只小黄铜铃上。你走过去查看，却突然又转过身来，因为那根旧的提升绳索突然坠落到了地上。上面肯定有人！ 好的！” 你继续让山羊们干活，把剩下的绳子拉到另一个舵室那里，不久之后，那端的绳子就又回到了你手中，可以用来把东西绑在升降装置上了。几分钟后，你终于完成了工作，然后退后几步，自豪地欣赏自己的成果。 悬崖的顶部和底部终于重新连接在一起了！ 你只需要拉动铃绳，事情就会开始运转起来。
rows.raw: " You approach the abandoned wheel house at the bottom of the cliffs, rope in hand and followed by an obedient herd of mountain goats. Getting the beasts hitched up is the easy part, as they're tame enough in your hands and there's a few bags of feed left sitting around to keep them occupied. But the rope... well, you've got to find a way to replace the rope connecting the wheelhouses together, with the lift itself in the middle. What's there at present is frayed to the point of snapping; in other places it's just been outright sliced by demonic vandals. Thankfully the worst of the damage stops just a short ways out of reach. You get the goats moving, have them rotate the ropes down a little so you can tie the replacement to the frayed ends, and then reverse them to send it right back up. You watch the new rope slowly ascend up the smooth cliff face, all the way to the other wheel house. Now you just need to go all the way back, and- You hear a bell ding next to you. There's another, smaller rope connect the two wheel houses, and this one's tied to a small brass bell tucked against the wall. You go to examine it, only to whip around again as the old lift rope plummets to the ground. Somebody's up there! "Yes!" You keep your goats working, hoisting the rest of the rope up to the other wheelhouse, and soon enough the other end's falling back to you, ready to be tied up to the lift. You finish up in a few moments, then step back and proudly behold your work. The clifftop and bottom are finally reconnected! You just need to ring the bell rope to get things moving. "

rows.original:
You step onto the platform and ring the bell rope, signaling to the upper wheelhouse that you'd like to ascend. There's a short delay before the ropes securing the top bar of the lift go taut, and the bell at your level rings in return. The goats hitched to the wheel beside you immediately begin to plod forward, combining their strength with that of the beasts above to begin your ascent. 
    
    It takes several minutes to meander up the chalky-white cliffside, but it's a smooth ride. Occasionally you see the bell rope lift, keeping the animals down at the bottom working despite [silly
        |the lack of managerial oversight
        |there not being anyone there to oversee them
    ]. The wind blasts past you a few times, making you clutch at the guard rails on either side, but it's never strong enough to really threaten to send you over the edge. 
    
    [party.has cait
        |It does, at least, give Cait a thrill. She throws her hands up with an ecstatic "Whoo!"
    ]
    
    [party.has etheryn
        |Ryn's golden hair whips in the wind. She turns to face the cold air full-on, smiling to herself.
    ]
    
    [party.has arona
        |Arona's massive mane of raven hair billows around her like a cloak.
    ]
    
    [party.has agni
        |Agnimitra wraps her wings around herself, trying to fend off the cold.
    ]
    
    [party.has atugia
        |You catch Atugia rubbing at her neck, as if she's concerned a strong gust might blow her head clean away. The thought of her running all the way back down the coast to find it makes you smirk.
    ]
    
    The lift shudders at the top, hitting a pair of logs driven in the stone to keep it from overshooting the platform. The pack goats up her bleat, coming to a standstill, and the salamander lad that manages the upper house quickly goes about anchoring you to the wheelhouse. "Welcome back, Champion!"
    
    Good to be back.
rows.translation:
你走上平台，拉动铃绳，以此向上面的操作室示意你想要上升。稍作等待后，固定升降机顶部横杆的绳索开始绷紧，而你所在这一层的铃铛也随即响起，表示信号已经传递成功。 那些被套在你身旁车轮上的山羊立刻开始缓慢前行，它们将自己的力量与上方那些动物的力量结合起来，帮助你开始攀登。

虽然需要花费几分钟的时间才能沿着这片白垩质岩壁蜿蜒而上，但整个过程却非常平稳。 有时你会看到铃绳被拉起，尽管如此，底部的动物们依然在继续工作。 [silly
        |缺乏管理监督
        |因为那里没有人负责监督他们。
    ]狂风几次猛烈地吹过你的身体，迫使你紧紧抓住两侧的护栏，但它的强度从来都不足以真正将你吹到边缘之外。 
    
    [party.has cait
        |至少，这确实让凯特感到非常兴奋。她兴奋地举起双手，高喊：“哇哦！
    ]
    
    [party.has etheryn
        |瑞恩的金色长发在风中飘扬。她转过身，迎着寒冷的空气，独自微笑。
    ]
    
    [party.has arona
        |阿罗娜那一头浓密如乌鸦般的秀发像斗篷一样在她身周飘扬。
    ]
    
    [party.has agni
        |阿格尼米特拉将双翼紧紧环绕在身上，试图抵御寒冷。
    ]
    
    [party.has atugia
        |你看到阿图吉亚不停地揉着自己的脖子，好像担心有一阵强风会把她的头吹掉一样。一想到她得沿着海岸线跑回去找它的样子，你不禁会露出微笑。
    ]
    
    电梯在顶部微微震动，这是因为它碰到了那些被钉在石头上的木桩，这些木桩的作用是防止电梯超过平台的范围。那些驮着货物的山羊突然停止了叫声，静止不动了；而负责管理上层区域的那个男孩迅速过来，将你固定在驾驶室里。“欢迎回来，冠军！”

能够回来真是太好了。
rows.raw:
"
    You step onto the platform and ring the bell rope, signaling to the upper wheelhouse that you'd like to ascend. There's a short delay before the ropes securing the top bar of the lift go taut, and the bell at your level rings in return. The goats hitched to the wheel beside you immediately begin to plod forward, combining their strength with that of the beasts above to begin your ascent. 
    
    It takes several minutes to meander up the chalky-white cliffside, but it's a smooth ride. Occasionally you see the bell rope lift, keeping the animals down at the bottom working despite [silly
        |the lack of managerial oversight
        |there not being anyone there to oversee them
    ]. The wind blasts past you a few times, making you clutch at the guard rails on either side, but it's never strong enough to really threaten to send you over the edge. 
    
    [party.has cait
        |It does, at least, give Cait a thrill. She throws her hands up with an ecstatic "Whoo!"
    ]
    
    [party.has etheryn
        |Ryn's golden hair whips in the wind. She turns to face the cold air full-on, smiling to herself.
    ]
    
    [party.has arona
        |Arona's massive mane of raven hair billows around her like a cloak.
    ]
    
    [party.has agni
        |Agnimitra wraps her wings around herself, trying to fend off the cold.
    ]
    
    [party.has atugia
        |You catch Atugia rubbing at her neck, as if she's concerned a strong gust might blow her head clean away. The thought of her running all the way back down the coast to find it makes you smirk.
    ]
    
    The lift shudders at the top, hitting a pair of logs driven in the stone to keep it from overshooting the platform. The pack goats up her bleat, coming to a standstill, and the salamander lad that manages the upper house quickly goes about anchoring you to the wheelhouse. "Welcome back, Champion!"
    
    Good to be back.
    "

rows.original:
"Going back down," you say, mounting the platform. 

    "Ay-ahn, Champion!" the salamander attendant says, unhooking a set of anchor ropes from the platform. "Godspeed."
    
    He tugs on the bell rope to alert the lower wheelhouse's goat pack, and then rings one up top to get his own animals moving. The beasts dutifully being to circle their wheel, slowly but surely lowering the ropes in conjunction with their fellows down below. 
    
    It takes several minutes to steadily descent the chalky-white cliffside, but it's a smooth ride. Occasionally you see the bell rope lift, keeping the animals down at the bottom working despite [silly|the lack of managerial oversight|there not being anyone there to oversee them]. The wind howls past, making the platform rock side to side, but it's just too heavy to move more than a few inches even suspended off the side of a sheer cliff. 
    
    Even still, you grasp the handrails and hang on for the trip down...
rows.translation:
我们又要下去了，”你一边说着，一边登上平台。

“啊恩，冠军！”那位蝾螈侍从说道，同时从平台上解下一组锚绳。“祝你好运。”

他拉了拉铃绳，通知下层船舱里的山羊群，然后又敲响了顶层的铃绳，让自己的动物们也开始行动起来。 那些野兽们齐心协力地转动着它们的“轮子”，慢慢地但坚定地将绳子一起拉向下方的同伴们。

虽然需要花费几分钟的时间才能平稳地降下这片白垩质般的悬崖峭壁，但整个过程进行得非常顺利。 有时你会看到铃绳被拉起，尽管如此，底部的动物们依然在继续工作。 [silly|缺乏管理监督|因为那里没有人负责监督他们。]风呼啸着掠过，使得平台不停地左右摇晃，但这个平台实在太重了，即使悬挂在陡峭的悬崖边缘，也移动不了几英寸。

尽管如此，你还是紧紧抓住扶手，准备开始这段下坠的旅程……
rows.raw:
'
    "Going back down," you say, mounting the platform. 

    "Ay-ahn, Champion!" the salamander attendant says, unhooking a set of anchor ropes from the platform. "Godspeed."
    
    He tugs on the bell rope to alert the lower wheelhouse's goat pack, and then rings one up top to get his own animals moving. The beasts dutifully being to circle their wheel, slowly but surely lowering the ropes in conjunction with their fellows down below. 
    
    It takes several minutes to steadily descent the chalky-white cliffside, but it's a smooth ride. Occasionally you see the bell rope lift, keeping the animals down at the bottom working despite [silly|the lack of managerial oversight|there not being anyone there to oversee them]. The wind howls past, making the platform rock side to side, but it's just too heavy to move more than a few inches even suspended off the side of a sheer cliff. 
    
    Even still, you grasp the handrails and hang on for the trip down...
    '

rows.original: Between a few broken stones along the path here, you notice stalks of deep green starting to grow. Few enough people have been out this way that weeds are coming up all over the place... although, as you sniff at the air, these might not just be any old bit of greenery. You're no gardener, but that sure smells like wet winterstem in the air...
rows.translation: 在这条小路上，零星散布着一些碎石，你会注意到一些深绿色的草茎开始生长。因为很少有人会来到这个地方，所以杂草到处蔓延……不过，当你仔细闻了闻空气中的气味，你就会发现这些草并不普通。你虽然不是园艺专家，但这种气味确实很像潮湿的冬草……
rows.raw: "\n    Between a few broken stones along the path here, you notice stalks of deep green starting to grow. Few enough people have been out this way that weeds are coming up all over the place... although, as you sniff at the air, these might not just be any old bit of greenery. You're no gardener, but that sure smells like wet winterstem in the air...\n    "

rows.original: You stop by where these fragrant green leaves are peeking out between the stones and draw a small utility knife off your belt. A few quick cuts here, a little digging there, and you're able to gather up everything that looks ready to harvest. Give it some time to dry out and it'll fill a pipe or two!
rows.translation: 你走到那些散发着芳香的绿叶从石头间探出头来的地方，从腰带上取出一把小折刀。快速地切几下，再稍微挖一挖，就能收集到所有看起来可以采摘的植物了。让它们晾干一段时间，就可以用来填充一两根烟斗了！
rows.raw: "\n        You stop by where these fragrant green leaves are peeking out between the stones and draw a small utility knife off your belt. A few quick cuts here, a little digging there, and you're able to gather up everything that looks ready to harvest. Give it some time to dry out and it'll fill a pipe or two!\n        "

rows.original: Well, it's not like anybody's growing this intentionally.
rows.translation: 嗯，其实并没有人故意让这种情况发生。
rows.raw: "Well, it's not like anybody's growing this intentionally. "

rows.original: There's a rank, bitter smell in the air coming from just off the beaten path here. You take a deep breath, and [pc.dcb |scowl. That's a lot of semen, left to bake in the sun. |retch. Eugh. You've been at this long enough to recognize old cum, left to bake in the sun. |shiver. Ohh, somebody's pumped a lot of cum near here not too terribly long ago. ] You take a quick detour to see what happened. There's a small camp built up in a bit of rock-shrouded cover, hidden from the rain and not much else. Tattered bits of tent are still hanging from a couple pitons in the stone, and a ring of rocks mark out a campfire, though any cookware's been looted. There's no telling who set this place up: refugees, soldiers, brigands... but you can certainly tell who broke it up. Impish claw-marks are all over the tents and dirt, and the smell of corrupted seed is overpowering in the air. One wonders if the people here even knew there was a war on when they were taken. You shake your head and move on.
rows.translation: 在这条人迹罕至的小路上方，空气中弥漫着一股刺鼻的气味。你深吸一口气，然后…… [pc.dcb |皱眉……真是的。 很多 精液，被晾在阳光下晾干。 |呃……你们干这种事都干这么久了，应该能认出那些在阳光下晾晒过的老精液吧。 |发抖……哦，不久前肯定有人在这里射了很多精液。 ] 你绕道过去查看发生了什么。在那里，有一个用岩石遮挡起来的小营地，勉强可以避雨，但其他方面几乎没有什么设施。一些破旧的帐篷残片还挂在岩石上的几个固定点上，一圈石头围出了篝火的位置，不过所有的炊具都被抢走了。 谁建立了这个地方，已经无从考证了：是难民、士兵，还是强盗……但谁破坏了它，却一清二楚。帐篷和泥土上到处都是调皮的小爪子留下的痕迹，空气中也弥漫着腐败种子的刺鼻气味。 人们不禁会想，这些人在被带走的时候，是否甚至都不知道世界上正在发生战争。 你摇摇头，然后继续前行。
rows.raw: " There's a rank, bitter smell in the air coming from just off the beaten path here. You take a deep breath, and [pc.dcb |scowl. That's a lot of semen, left to bake in the sun. |retch. Eugh. You've been at this long enough to recognize old cum, left to bake in the sun. |shiver. Ohh, somebody's pumped a lot of cum near here not too terribly long ago. ] You take a quick detour to see what happened. There's a small camp built up in a bit of rock-shrouded cover, hidden from the rain and not much else. Tattered bits of tent are still hanging from a couple pitons in the stone, and a ring of rocks mark out a campfire, though any cookware's been looted. There's no telling who set this place up: refugees, soldiers, brigands... but you can certainly tell who broke it up. Impish claw-marks are all over the tents and dirt, and the smell of corrupted seed is overpowering in the air. One wonders if the people here even knew there was a war on when they were taken. You shake your head and move on. "

rows.original:
There's a slow, steady rumble building from the sea. You cast a glance out that way in time to see a strand of brilliant lightning striking the wine-dark sea. The skies are black as ink, roiling with the coming storm.
    
    [party.has cait
        |Cait draws her cloak tight around herself. "Oh, man. I hate the weather out here."
    ]
    
    [party.has brint
        |Brint surveys the clouds gravely. "Worst of the storm won't reach the shore. But it's gonna get real cold and miserable soon."
    ]
    
    A gust of wind howls in from the east, strong enough to make you stagger back — and sending a bone-deep chill through your body. You reckon you ought to find shelter soon.
rows.translation:
海面上传来一阵缓慢而持续的隆隆声。你顺着声音的方向望去，正好看到一道耀眼的闪电划破了漆黑的海洋。天空阴沉得如同墨水一般，暴风雨即将来临。
    
    [party.has cait
        |凯特将斗篷紧紧地裹在身上，说道：“哦，天哪，我真讨厌这里的天气。
    ]
    
    [party.has brint
        |布林特凝重地望着天空中的云层：“这场风暴的最恶劣部分不会影响到海岸，但很快天气就会变得非常寒冷，情况也会变得很糟糕。
    ]
    
    一阵狂风从东方呼啸而来，强劲得足以让你踉跄后退——同时让你的全身陷入彻骨的寒意之中。你意识到，自己应该尽快寻找避风的地方了。
rows.raw:
'
    There's a slow, steady rumble building from the sea. You cast a glance out that way in time to see a strand of brilliant lightning striking the wine-dark sea. The skies are black as ink, roiling with the coming storm.
    
    [party.has cait
        |Cait draws her cloak tight around herself. "Oh, man. I hate the weather out here."
    ]
    
    [party.has brint
        |Brint surveys the clouds gravely. "Worst of the storm won't reach the shore. But it's gonna get real cold and miserable soon."
    ]
    
    A gust of wind howls in from the east, strong enough to make you stagger back — and sending a bone-deep chill through your body. You reckon you ought to find shelter soon.
    '

rows.original: The silence of the coastland is interrupted by the flapping of wings. "We meet again, traveller." A familiar voice precedes the landing of a familiar figure: [pc.dcb |ugh, that obnoxious bird again. |the harpy you already clashed with. |the cutiepie warrioress! ] She points her three pronged weapon at you, narrowing her eyes. "What rends the waves of the sea?" Again with this riddle? You prepare your weapon and assume a fighting stance: [pc.dcb |looks like she's in for another asswhooping by your hand. |you don't know the answer, but you're not backing down. |even if you're a bimbo, you can play rough! ] "Very well; in the name of the Longclaw Consortium, you shan't pass!" Defend yourself!
rows.translation: 海岸线的宁静被翅膀的拍打声打破了。 “又见面了，旅人。” 一个熟悉的声音响起，紧接着，一个熟悉的身影也降临了： [pc.dcb |呃，又是那只讨厌的鸟。 |你之前已经与那只女妖发生了冲突。 |那个可爱的女战士！ ] 她将那把三叉武器指向你，眼睛眯成了一条线。 “是什么在激起海浪的汹涌？” 又来这个谜语？你立刻准备好武器，摆出了战斗姿态： [pc.dcb |看来她又要被你狠狠教训一顿了。 |你不知道答案，但却没有放弃。 |就算你是个傻瓜，也可以玩得粗野一点嘛！ ] 很好；以长爪联盟的名义，你们绝对不能通过！ 自卫吧！
rows.raw: ' The silence of the coastland is interrupted by the flapping of wings. "We meet again, traveller." A familiar voice precedes the landing of a familiar figure: [pc.dcb |ugh, that obnoxious bird again. |the harpy you already clashed with. |the cutiepie warrioress! ] She points her three pronged weapon at you, narrowing her eyes. "What rends the waves of the sea?" Again with this riddle? You prepare your weapon and assume a fighting stance: [pc.dcb |looks like she's in for another asswhooping by your hand. |you don't know the answer, but you're not backing down. |even if you're a bimbo, you can play rough! ] "Very well; in the name of the Longclaw Consortium, you shan't pass!" Defend yourself!'

rows.original: Venturing forth in the placid coastline, you come across a particularly concerning sight. All around, you see a group of incapacitated, almost naked people. None of them are moving, except for a single person, who's wincing in pain on the sandy soil. You quickly reach the injured guy, who immediately coughs up water and grabs your hand, looking at you with relieved eyes. "S-someone attacked us... " he mutters in pain.[silly |"Her unique upper body stance... S-spear techniques reminiscent of a dance... using one wrist as the center of its rotation... then crushing the opponent between her spear thrusts and the rising waves... |"S-spear... water everywhere... we were crushed from all sides..." ] "Run... Away..." Wait... what does he mean about this? Before you can inquire further, the man closes his eyes and his hand goes limp. You check his pulse: thankfully he is still alive. Something's coming, if the injured man is to be believed, and you want to be ready. [silly |"Minemineminemineminemineminemineminemine..." |"Halt." ] A stern, womanly voice coming from above breaks the silence as you ready your weapon. [silly |"Mine..." |"This territory belongs to the Longclaw Consortium. Turn back or face me." ] Imperious words come from the newly arrived woman as she lands on the ground, blue magic gathering around her. You can clearly see her now, a sunkissed harpy with white, grey and black feathers. A long, wavy mane of those feathers goes down to her waist. Dull gold eyes encircled with orange eyeliner, and a similarly marked lower lip, lead to an intimidating display when contrasted with her otherwise-dull plumage. [party.has agni |"A seagull harpy," Agni remarks, reading herself for combat. "I should have known. Be careful: they are fierce combatants and rarely move alone, which means there must be other ones nearby." ] "What rends the waves of the sea?" The woman narrows her eyes, pointing her trident at you — she's clearly expecting an answer to her riddle. Is this the way she grants safe passage? Is this why she attacked and stripped those poor people naked? "If you don't know the answer, draw your weapon and face me!" [party.som |You will avenge the people she has attacked! |She raises her free hand, conjuring a blue energy that gathers into a single point to her right, coming into the shape of a large sphere. Looks like it will be a fair fight! |She raises her free hand, conjuring a blue energy that gathers into two points to her left and her right, coming into the shape of two large spheres. Looks like it will be a fair fight! ] Defend yourself!
rows.translation: 当你沿着宁静的海岸线前行时，你突然看到了一个令人十分担忧的场景。 周围到处都是那些失去行动能力、几乎赤裸的人们。他们中没有一个人在移动，只有一个人例外——他正躺在沙地上，痛苦地呻吟着。你迅速赶到了那个受伤的人身边，他立刻咳出了水，紧紧抓住了你的手，用充满感激的眼神看着你。 “有人袭击了我们……”他痛苦地低声说道。[silly |她那独特的上半身姿态……那些仿佛舞蹈般的长矛技巧……以一只手腕作为旋转的中心……然后利用长矛的刺击与不断上升的力量将对手彻底压制…… |长矛……水……到处都是水……我们被四面八方的水流冲击得无处可逃…… ] 跑……快跑……” 等等……他这话是什么意思？ 还没等你进一步追问，那个男人就闭上了眼睛，手也软了下来。你检查了他的脉搏：幸好他还没有死。如果那个受伤的男人说的是真的，那么有什么东西即将来临，而你必须做好准备。 [silly |米米米米米米米米米米米…… |停下。 ] 就在你准备拿起武器的瞬间，上方传来一个严厉而充满女性特质的声音，打破了这份寂静。 [silly |我的…… |这片领土属于长爪联盟。要么退回去，要么面对我。 ] 这位新抵达的女性刚一落地，便说出了威严的话语，蓝色的魔力在她周围聚集起来。 此刻，你可以清楚地看到她的模样：她是一只被阳光晒成金色的女妖，拥有白色、灰色和黑色的羽毛。那一头长长的、波浪状的羽毛一直垂到她的腰部。她那暗金色的眼睛周围画着橙色的眼线，下唇也有着同样的纹路，这样的外貌与她其他部分较为暗淡的羽毛形成了鲜明的对比，显得格外令人畏惧。 [party.has agni |一只海鸥女妖，”阿格尼边阅读相关资料边说道，“我早该猜到的。小心点：它们是极其凶猛的战斗生物，而且很少单独行动，这意味着附近肯定还有其他同类。 ] 是什么让海浪翻腾不息？” 那个女人眯起眼睛，用她的三叉戟指着你——她显然在期待你回答这个谜题。难道这就是她给予人们安全通行的方式吗？难道这就是她攻击那些可怜人并将他们剥得精光的原因吗？ “如果你不知道答案，那就拔出你的武器，与我对峙吧！ [party.som |你一定要为那些被她伤害的人们报仇！ |她抬起空闲的右手，凝聚出一股蓝色的能量，这些能量在她的右侧汇聚成一个小点，最终形成了一个巨大的球体。看来这次对决将会非常激烈啊！ |她抬起空闲的右手，凝聚出一股蓝色能量，这些能量在她的左右两侧分别汇聚成两个巨大的球体。看来这将是一场势均力敌的战斗！ ] 自卫吧！
