Looks like it will be a fair fight! ] Defend yourself!'

rows.original:
Once again, your silent crossing of the coastlands is interrupted by a familiar flap of wings.

    "Halt, [pc.name]."
    
    Fortuna lands before you, trident in hand and ready to engage.
    
    "What rends the waves of the sea?"
    
    Do you give an answer?
rows.translation:
又一次，你在海岸线上悄无声息地前行时，那熟悉的翅膀拍打声打断了你的行动。

“站住…… [pc.name]福图娜出现在你面前，手持三叉戟，准备与你交战。

“是什么在搅动海浪？”

你会给出答案吗？
rows.raw:
'
    Once again, your silent crossing of the coastlands is interrupted by a familiar flap of wings.

    "Halt, [pc.name]."
    
    Fortuna lands before you, trident in hand and ready to engage.
    
    "What rends the waves of the sea?"
    
    Do you give an answer?'

rows.original:
"The trident of Fortuna Zorba, daughter of Adriano Zorba," you announce. Fortuna smiles, lowering her weapon.

        "Good to see you, [pc.name]. You may pass, but I have time for a chat if you wish."
        
        How will you spend your time with Fortuna?
rows.translation:
这是阿德里亚诺·佐尔巴的女儿——福图娜·佐尔巴的三叉戟，”你说道。福图娜微笑着，放下了她的武器。

“很高兴见到你…… [pc.name]你可以走了，但如果你愿意的话，我也有时间陪你聊聊天。”

那么，你打算如何度过与Fortuna共处的时光呢？
rows.raw:
'
        "The trident of Fortuna Zorba, daughter of Adriano Zorba," you announce. Fortuna smiles, lowering her weapon.

        "Good to see you, [pc.name]. You may pass, but I have time for a chat if you wish."
        
        How will you spend your time with Fortuna?'

rows.original: You smirk, remaining silent and readying your weapon. You know the words, but you're in the mood for a fight. She grabs her weapon with both hands, staring at you with eyes like steel. "Very well; I shall test your mettle one more time!" Defend yourself!
rows.translation: 你露出一丝 smirk，保持沉默，同时准备好了武器。你知道该说些什么，但现在你只想打架。 她用双手握紧武器，用钢铁般坚定的目光盯着你。 “好吧，那我就再考验你的勇气一次！ 自卫吧！
rows.raw: ' You smirk, remaining silent and readying your weapon. You know the words, but you're in the mood for a fight. She grabs her weapon with both hands, staring at you with eyes like steel. "Very well; I shall test your mettle one more time!" Defend yourself!'

rows.original: Get some one on one action with this harpy enforcer.
rows.translation: 与这位女妖般的执行者来一场一对一的对决吧。
rows.raw: "Get some one on one action with this harpy enforcer."

rows.original: [pc.hasCredits 1000|You've already learned all Fortuna has to offer.|You feel like she's going to charge you more than what you currently have.]
rows.translation: [pc.hasCredits 1000|你已经掌握了Fortuna所提供的一切功能与知识。|你感觉她可能会向你收取比你目前拥有的更多的费用。]
rows.raw: "[pc.hasCredits 1000|You've already learned all Fortuna has to offer.|You feel like she's going to charge you more than what you currently have.]"

rows.original:
It's time for you to proceed. You wave Fortuna goodbye; she answers by nodding and turning around.

        "Until we meet again, [pc.name]."
        
        You watch her fly away before returning to your devices.
rows.translation:
是时候让你继续行动了。你向福尔图娜道别，她点了点头然后转身离去。

“直到我们再次相见。 [pc.name]你看着她飞走，然后才回到自己的设备前继续操作。
rows.raw:
'
        It's time for you to proceed. You wave Fortuna goodbye; she answers by nodding and turning around.

        "Until we meet again, [pc.name]."
        
        You watch her fly away before returning to your devices.'

rows.original:
Fortuna stands at 5'9" tall, carrying herself like a noble warrior.

    Her curly, waist-long feather-hair are fashioned with braid strings of beads, with a single ponytail near the small of her back. White like snow under the midday sun, they frame her stern but feminine face. Her pale-gold eyes are adorned with an orange circle of makeup, accentuating her fierce eyes, while her lower lip is covered by lipstick of the same color.
    
    Her physique is toned, with faintly visible muscles throughout her hourglass figure. Her sizable D-cups grab your attention as well as her wide, bubble but. As a harpy, she possesses magnificent wings of equally magnificent colors; the upper section is pale white, which gently shifts to gray as it reaches the lower section, becoming pitch black. Her arms are covered in feathers of the same pattern of her wings, while her strong legs are covered in yellow scales, ending in clawed, webbed feet.
    
    Her armor is relatively light, supporting her fighting style that wields both water magic and trident techniques.
rows.translation:
福图娜身高5英尺9英寸，举止举止宛如一位高贵的战士。

她那及腰的卷曲羽毛头发上编织着串串珠子，背后稍微扎成一个马尾。在正午的阳光下，这些雪一般的白发衬托出她那张严肃而充满女性魅力的面容。 她那淡金色的眼睛上涂着橙色的眼妆，这种妆容更加突出了她那充满锐利神采的眼睛，而她的下唇也涂着同样颜色的口红。

她的体态匀称，沙漏般的曲线中隐约可见肌肉的轮廓。 她那引人注目的D罩杯，以及她那宽大的、略带泡泡状的嘴唇，同样吸引了人们的目光。作为一只女妖，她拥有色彩斑斓的美丽翅膀：翅膀的上半部分呈淡白色，逐渐过渡到灰色，而到了下半部分则变成了漆黑的颜色。 她的双臂覆盖着与翅膀相同的羽毛图案，而结实的双腿则布满了黄色的鳞片，脚部末端长有带蹼的爪子。

她的盔甲相对较轻，这种设计正好适合她那种同时运用水系魔法与三叉戟技巧的战斗风格。
rows.raw:
"
    Fortuna stands at 5'9" tall, carrying herself like a noble warrior.

    Her curly, waist-long feather-hair are fashioned with braid strings of beads, with a single ponytail near the small of her back. White like snow under the midday sun, they frame her stern but feminine face. Her pale-gold eyes are adorned with an orange circle of makeup, accentuating her fierce eyes, while her lower lip is covered by lipstick of the same color.
    
    Her physique is toned, with faintly visible muscles throughout her hourglass figure. Her sizable D-cups grab your attention as well as her wide, bubble but. As a harpy, she possesses magnificent wings of equally magnificent colors; the upper section is pale white, which gently shifts to gray as it reaches the lower section, becoming pitch black. Her arms are covered in feathers of the same pattern of her wings, while her strong legs are covered in yellow scales, ending in clawed, webbed feet.
    
    Her armor is relatively light, supporting her fighting style that wields both water magic and trident techniques."

rows.original: "I'm up for a chat; got anything in particular you want to ask?"
rows.translation: 我很乐意聊天，有什么特别想问我的吗？
rows.raw: '\n    "I\'m up for a chat; got anything in particular you want to ask?"'

rows.original: So, what's her story? "It's probably the strangest you can think of; after all, being raised by jassiran catfolk is not what you would typically hear from a harpy." [party.has agni |"More common than you would expect." Agni chimes in, seemingly knowing by experience. "I know hundreds of ballads about catfolk seducers enticing harpies into society. Want me to tell you about Andreus the egg-collector and his harem?" "You know about that? Gods, I thought it was just some drunken jape made by one of my uncles." Fortuna's laugh is genuine. "But I think I'll have to pass. My story is not that grandiose." ] Oh? "My adoptive father, my true father, met my mother in... unfortunate circumstances," Fortuna begins, nodding once. "She was out hunting in the sea for food and provisions when she accidentally dove into a pool of contaminated water. A ship nearby suffered a mutiny and had its contraband goods thrown overboard... you can figure out what happened." Poisoned. You solemnly nod, lowering your gaze. "She flew towards the shore, and crashed right near my father's camp. Thank the gods he was present, otherwise I might not even be here today." [pc.dcb |The bird was knocked up, it seems. |Her mother was pregnant, wasn't she? |Mommy bird had a pretty bun in the oven! ] "Bingo," she nods, crossing her arms under her generous chest. "She didn't have much long to live when my father tried to save her. Despite his knowledge of poisons and underground alchemists, he was completely unprepared for what had happened. He sent every available man and woman in camp for help, but my mother's time was up. In her last breath, she made him swear that he would take care of me, raise me, and above all else, teach me how to fly." Teaching her how to fly? She chuckles at your question. "Not for nothing. I thought I was a catfolk when I was a child. How can a 'groundwalker' teach a harpy how to fly? Anyway... my father rushed to get the antidote, but when they returned, it was too late: they found her dead, clutching an egg—me—to her chest." At least her daughter survived. "Don't sulk like that, my life has been a blast, mostly. I may have grown up without a mother, but my bizarre uncles and aunts more than made up for it," she waves, trying to cheer you up. "I grew up learning that my father was a high ranking member of the Longclaw Consortium, a smuggler ring dealing in magic artifacts and alchemical substances. Khor'Minos has plenty of mages, nobles and collectors who employ our services, so we are well-protected from potential hindrances," she continues, moving her trident from one hand to the other. "Didn't take long for me to want to take part in the family business despite its... questionably legal status. My father was adamant in refusing me at first... but not for the reasons you might expect." You take a guess: it had to do with the promise he made to her dying mother? "Yeah," she smiles. "It's a dangerous job by all intents and purposes, where only the cunning can prosper. Despite the initial resistance, he promised that once I learned how to fly and to excel in combat, he would have allowed me to oversee the transit of ships along the coastline." So that's why she's such a capable fighter. "Indeed. I busted my ass for a long time to finally get my father to accept me into the fold. Not only is the pay great, but I get to raid the ships that trespass into our territory," she says with an enthusiastic smile. "Sometimes you can pilfer some really amazing trinkets, for which you can fetch a really good price when you find the right fencer. With the blockade going on, we were probably the only source of highly sought-after goods, which earns us a fortune, but it also paints a giant target on our backs — it's why security has to be at its tightest." Sounds like a [pc.dcb |satisfying |dangerous |meanie ] way to live. "It's survival of the fittest. If you assume that your adversaries are going to play by the rules, you will not survive for long in this line of work. The major powers create opportunities; the middle powers capitalize on them. Learning how to do it is often what makes the difference between a big score and a slap in your face," she concludes.
rows.translation: 那么，她的故事是什么呢？ “这可能是你能想象到的最离奇的故事了；毕竟，被贾西兰猫人抚养长大，这种经历可不是你通常会从女妖口中听到的。 [party.has agni |这种情况比你想象的要普遍得多。”阿格尼插话道，显然她是根据经验来说的，“我知道有上百首关于猫人魅惑者将女妖诱骗到人类社会中的民谣。想让我给你讲讲那个收集鸡蛋的安德烈乌斯和他的后宫故事吗？” “你居然知道这个？天啊，我还以为这只是我某个叔叔喝醉后编出来的玩笑呢。”福图娜笑着说，“不过我想我还是算了吧……我的故事可没有那么精彩。 ] 哦？ “我的养父，我的…… true 父亲，我和母亲是在……一些不幸的情况下相识的，”福图娜开始说道，同时轻轻点了点头。“当时她正在海上寻找食物和补给，不慎掉进了一片被污染的水域。而附近有一艘船发生了叛乱，那些违禁品就被扔到了海里。……你可以自己想明白发生了什么。” 中毒了。你严肃地点了点头，低下了目光。 “她飞向了海岸，然后坠落在我父亲营地附近。多亏他当时在那里，否则我可能今天就已经不在人世了。" [pc.dcb |看来那只鸟怀孕了。 |她妈妈当时怀孕了，对吧？ |鸟妈妈快要生小宝宝了！ ] 没错，”她点点头，双臂交叉在宽大的胸前。“当我父亲试图救她的时候，她的生命已经所剩无几了。尽管他对各种毒物以及地下炼金术有所了解，但他完全无法预料到会发生这样的事情。他召集了营地里所有能派上用场的人去帮忙，但我的母亲还是没能挺过来。在她临终前，她让父亲发誓一定要照顾我、抚养我，最重要的是，要教会我如何飞翔。 教她如何飞翔？ 她听到你的问题，轻笑出声：“当然有原因。我小时候还以为自己是一只猫人呢。一个‘地行者’怎么可能教一只女妖如何飞翔呢？总之……我父亲急忙去取解药，但当他们回来时，已经太晚了：他们发现她已经死了，怀里紧紧抱着一个蛋——也就是我。 至少她的女儿活了下来。 “别这么闷闷不乐的，我的人生大部分时间都过得非常愉快。虽然我是在没有母亲的环境中长大的，但那些古怪的叔叔阿姨们完全弥补了这一缺憾，”她一边说，一边试图让你开心起来。 我从小就知道，我的父亲是长爪联盟的高层成员，这个组织专门从事魔法物品和炼金物质的走私活动。在科尔米诺斯，有很多法师、贵族和收藏家都会使用我们的服务，因此我们能够很好地避免遇到任何潜在的阻碍，”她一边说着，一边将三叉戟在双手之间来回移动。 尽管这家企业的法律地位存疑，但我很快就产生了想要参与其中经营的念头。起初，我父亲坚决拒绝我的请求……不过，原因并非你可能想象到的那些。 你猜猜看：这会不会和他对自己临终的母亲所做的承诺有关呢？ “是的，”她微笑着说，“从本质上来说，这是一份非常危险的工作，只有那些狡猾狡诈的人才能在这种环境中取得成功。尽管起初他有些反对，但他承诺，一旦我学会了飞行技巧，并且在战斗中表现出色，他就会允许我负责监督沿海岸线航行的船只。 这就是为什么她成为一名如此出色的战士的原因。 “确实如此。我付出了很多努力，才终于让父亲同意让我加入这个团队。不仅薪水很高，而且我还能参与袭击那些侵犯我们领地的船只，”她兴奋地笑着说。 有时候，你能找到一些非常珍贵的小玩意儿，只要找到合适的买家，就能卖个好价钱。在当前这种封锁环境下，我们可能是那些备受追捧的商品的唯一来源，这也让我们赚了一大笔钱。但与此同时，这也让我们成了众矢之的——正因如此，我们必须把安全措施做得滴水不漏。" 听起来不错啊。 [pc.dcb |令人满意 |危险的 |坏心眼的人 ] 一种生存方式。 “这就是适者生存的法则。如果你认为你的对手会遵守规则，那么在这条道路上，你很快就会失败。强大的势力会创造机会，而中等实力的势力则会利用这些机会。学会如何抓住这些机会，往往就能决定你是获得巨大的成功，还是遭受沉重的打击，”她总结道。
rows.raw: ' So, what's her story? "It's probably the strangest you can think of; after all, being raised by jassiran catfolk is not what you would typically hear from a harpy." [party.has agni |"More common than you would expect." Agni chimes in, seemingly knowing by experience. "I know hundreds of ballads about catfolk seducers enticing harpies into society. Want me to tell you about Andreus the egg-collector and his harem?" "You know about that? Gods, I thought it was just some drunken jape made by one of my uncles." Fortuna's laugh is genuine. "But I think I'll have to pass. My story is not that grandiose." ] Oh? "My adoptive father, my true father, met my mother in... unfortunate circumstances," Fortuna begins, nodding once. "She was out hunting in the sea for food and provisions when she accidentally dove into a pool of contaminated water. A ship nearby suffered a mutiny and had its contraband goods thrown overboard... you can figure out what happened." Poisoned. You solemnly nod, lowering your gaze. "She flew towards the shore, and crashed right near my father's camp. Thank the gods he was present, otherwise I might not even be here today." [pc.dcb |The bird was knocked up, it seems. |Her mother was pregnant, wasn't she? |Mommy bird had a pretty bun in the oven! ] "Bingo," she nods, crossing her arms under her generous chest. "She didn't have much long to live when my father tried to save her. Despite his knowledge of poisons and underground alchemists, he was completely unprepared for what had happened. He sent every available man and woman in camp for help, but my mother's time was up. In her last breath, she made him swear that he would take care of me, raise me, and above all else, teach me how to fly." Teaching her how to fly? She chuckles at your question. "Not for nothing. I thought I was a catfolk when I was a child. How can a 'groundwalker' teach a harpy how to fly? Anyway... my father rushed to get the antidote, but when they returned, it was too late: they found her dead, clutching an egg—me—to her chest." At least her daughter survived. "Don't sulk like that, my life has been a blast, mostly. I may have grown up without a mother, but my bizarre uncles and aunts more than made up for it," she waves, trying to cheer you up. "I grew up learning that my father was a high ranking member of the Longclaw Consortium, a smuggler ring dealing in magic artifacts and alchemical substances. Khor'Minos has plenty of mages, nobles and collectors who employ our services, so we are well-protected from potential hindrances," she continues, moving her trident from one hand to the other. "Didn't take long for me to want to take part in the family business despite its... questionably legal status. My father was adamant in refusing me at first... but not for the reasons you might expect." You take a guess: it had to do with the promise he made to her dying mother? "Yeah," she smiles. "It's a dangerous job by all intents and purposes, where only the cunning can prosper. Despite the initial resistance, he promised that once I learned how to fly and to excel in combat, he would have allowed me to oversee the transit of ships along the coastline." So that's why she's such a capable fighter. "Indeed. I busted my ass for a long time to finally get my father to accept me into the fold. Not only is the pay great, but I get to raid the ships that trespass into our territory," she says with an enthusiastic smile. "Sometimes you can pilfer some really amazing trinkets, for which you can fetch a really good price when you find the right fencer. With the blockade going on, we were probably the only source of highly sought-after goods, which earns us a fortune, but it also paints a giant target on our backs — it's why security has to be at its tightest." Sounds like a [pc.dcb |satisfying |dangerous |meanie ] way to live. "It's survival of the fittest. If you assume that your adversaries are going to play by the rules, you will not survive for long in this line of work. The major powers create opportunities; the middle powers capitalize on them. Learning how to do it is often what makes the difference between a big score and a slap in your face," she concludes.'

rows.original: What was it like, growing up as a smuggler harpy in the big city? "Hah, it surely was an interesting experience. As the daughter of a smuggler syndicate's boss, most of the rundown streets were safe for me, but we still used to terrorize the fishermen," she admits, happily recalling her childhood. "So many times we snuck inside their ships, hid in the hold and ransacked the food... me, my brother and the boys of my gang were the biggest threats to their cargo." [party.has cait |"Hehee! I know that too well! Few things are better than fresh fish!" Cait says, gleefully swaying left and right with a big smile on her face. ] Oh, she has a brother? "He's not really my brother, but my cousin — my father's sister's son. We were the same age when we were first introduced, we quickly clicked and became good friends. Alas... harpies grow up and mature way faster than other races... So while he became a boy of ten, I became capable of conducting raids on enemy ships. I miss the days when we could hang out... I have to act like an older sister to him now." A nostalgic smile appears on her lips. [party.has agni |"Such is our life as harpies. Time flies when you're young... it flies until you realize that you have outgrown the people you love." A somber Agni chimes in, attracting Fortuna's attention. "It's one of the things that made me realize I wasn't a catfolk after all," the oceanic harpy chuckles, agreeing with the phoenix bard. "but in hindsight, I don't regret that it happened... not completely, at least." She stops for a moment, digging more into her memories. ] "That reminds me... it was around the time when my father started to grow worried about his promise." She's referring to her ability to fly? "Yeah," she nods, crossing her arms under her breasts. "I remained grounded for a considerable amount of time, much longer than what you would expect from my kind. Usually, harpies learn to fly instinctively when they are children, but my wings were much weaker when compared to harpies of my age." An unusual condition, to say the least. "Dad had doctors and alchemists check me out, and we concluded that the poison that killed my mother seeped into my egg and weakened the structure of my wings; that's why I didn't attempt to fly earlier. Luckily, the Consortium's second in command and chief alchemist, Sandro Serevare, concocted an antidote which neutralized the poison and strengthened my limbs. When I realized that I could hover for a short time, that's where the funny part began." You chuckle, admitting that the image of a catfolk learning how to fly for his daughter is a funny one. "We tried different approaches: a strong lupine warrior hurling me into the air, a wyld elf mage pushing me with a gust of wind... we even asked an Astrida for the specifics of a levitation spell to help me." She grimaces as she speaks. "I always landed on soft ground, but my butt complained a lot." [pc.dcb |No pain, no gain. |A hard landing by all intents and purposes. |Owie... if you were there, you would have given a nice massage. ] "During one of the attempts, I climbed on the tallest cliff on the sea during a surprisingly windy day. A storm was approaching, but Roberta, my aunt, mentioned that it was just what I needed. When I felt ready, I jumped down and spread my wings. What I had to do was follow the currents, not fight against them..." she pauses, taking a deep breath. "I soared." You see Fortuna's back arching, almost as if a shiver of pleasure is running down her spine. She must have felt on top of the world when it happened. "Indeed I did, it felt incredible. I couldn't believe I was actually flying... everything seemed so small from up there, everything felt magnificent... until I bashed my head on another cliff." You wheeze. [pc.dcb |Serves her right! |What? |Ouchie! ] She blushes. "That was the first thing I learned: always look where you're going." As your laughs stop, you mention that her father must have been proud of her. "He fulfilled the promise he made to my mother... My brother told me that he shed a few tears when he saw me soar."
rows.translation: 在大城市里作为一个走私者的女儿长大，那是怎样的经历呢？ “哈哈，那确实是一段有趣的经历。作为走私集团老板的女儿，大多数破败的街区对我来说都是安全的，但我们还是会去吓唬那些渔民。”她开心地回忆着自己的童年。 “有很多次，我们偷偷潜入他们的船上，躲在货舱里，然后把他们的食物洗劫一空……我和我的兄弟以及我们帮派的那些男孩，对他们来说，确实是他们货物最大的威胁。 [party.has cait |嘿嘿！我太明白这一点了！没有什么比新鲜的鱼更美味的了！”凯特开心地笑着说，脸上洋溢着灿烂的笑容，身体还左右摇晃着。 ] 哦，她还有个哥哥？ “他其实并不是我的亲哥哥，而是我的表哥——我父亲的妹妹的儿子。我们初次见面时年龄相仿，很快就成为了好朋友。可惜……女妖的成长速度比其他种族快得多……所以当他还是个十岁的小男孩时，我已经能够带领队伍去袭击敌舰了。我真的很怀念我们曾经一起玩耍的那些日子……现在，我不得不扮演姐姐的角色来照顾他。” 她的嘴角浮现出一丝怀旧的微笑。 [party.has agni |这就是我们这些‘复仇女神’的生活。年轻时，时间过得飞快……直到你意识到，自己已经超越了那些你所爱的人。” 阿格尼忧郁地说道，这番话引起了福尔图娜的注意。 正是这件事让我意识到，我终究并不是猫人一族的一员，”这位海洋女妖轻笑着，表示赞同那位凤凰吟游士的观点。“不过现在回想起来，我并不后悔发生了这样的事……至少不是完全后悔。 她停顿了一下，更加深入地回想起那些记忆。 ] 这让我想起来……就在那个时候，我的父亲开始为他的承诺感到担忧。” 她指的是自己飞行的能力吗？ “是的，”她点点头，双臂交叉在胸前。 “我有很长一段时间都无法飞行，这个时间比你们想象中要长得多。通常情况下，女妖在小时候就会本能地学会飞行，但与同龄的女妖相比，我的翅膀要弱得多。 至少可以说，这是一种非常罕见的情况。 “爸爸让医生和炼金术士对我进行了检查，他们认为杀死我母亲的那种毒物渗入了我的蛋中，从而削弱了我翅膀的结构；这就是为什么我之前没有尝试飞行的原因。幸运的是，联盟的副领袖兼首席炼金术士桑德罗·塞雷瓦雷研制出了一种解药，这种解药能够中和那种毒物，并增强我的四肢力量。当我发现自己能够短暂地悬停在空中时，有趣的事情就开始了。 你轻笑出声，承认那个猫人为了女儿努力学习飞行的场景确实很有趣。 “我们尝试了各种方法：让一位强壮的狼人战士把我抛向空中，让一位野精灵法师用一阵风来推动我……甚至还向阿斯特里达请教了关于悬浮咒语的具体细节来帮助我。”她说着，脸上露出苦笑，“每次我落地的地方都很柔软，但我的屁股确实遭到了不少‘折磨’。 [pc.dcb |不劳无获。 |从各方面来看，这都是一次惨重的失败。 |哎哟……要是你在场的话，肯定能给我做一个很舒服的按摩呢。 ] 在那次尝试中，我在一个风浪极大的日子里爬上了海边最高的悬崖。一场风暴正在逼近，但我的阿姨罗伯塔说，这正是我所需要的。当我觉得准备充分时，我就跳了下去，展开了翅膀。我需要做的就是顺着气流飞行，而不是与它们抗争……”她停顿了一下，深吸了一口气，然后继续说道：“我…… 飙升你看，Fortuna的背部正在弯曲，仿佛有一阵愉悦的颤动正从她的脊椎处传下来。当那一刻发生的时候，她一定感觉自己仿佛置身于世界的顶峰。” “确实如此，那种感觉简直难以置信。我简直不敢相信自己真的在飞翔……从高处往下看，一切看起来都如此渺小，一切都显得如此壮丽……直到我的头撞到了另一块悬崖上。” “你喘着气说道。 [pc.dcb |活该！ |什么？ |哎哟！ ] 她脸红了：“这是我最早学到的道理：走路时一定要看清楚前方。” 当你们的笑声渐渐停止后，你提到她的父亲一定为她感到骄傲。 “他兑现了对我母亲的承诺……我哥哥告诉我，当他看到我在空中翱翔时，他也流下了眼泪。

rows.original:
You don't think you've ever seen an offensive combination of trident techniques and water magic. Why did she choose to master such abilities?
        
        She places the trident on her shoulders, a sincere smiling blooming on her lips.
        
        "My love for the seas is something I developed right after I learnt to fly."
        
        She begins, turning towards the water.
        
        "I've already told you about how difficult it was for me to finally spread my wings and conquer the sky... When I did, I felt like the whole world was in my hands. I thought there was nothing I couldn't do, nothing I couldn't reach, nothing I couldn't take."
        
        Nothing except the sea, isn't it?
        
        She nods, lowering her weapon back to the ground.
        
        "Flying over the endless blue waves, I naturally developed an intense desire to dive. When I looked below me, I saw an entire world ripe for the taking. I saw mysteries, shipwrecks with histories of their own, life forms we barely know about... and I wanted to reach them; I wanted to conquer the seas just like I conquered the skies."
        
        Fortuna's eyes are firm as steel and burning with passion.
        
        "I trained myself to hold my breath for lengthy periods of time, I mastered the art of water magic in order to better understand how I could win over the ocean, I excelled in the art of the trident to better defend myself from the potentially insidious creatures of the abyss... but no matter how much I pushed my body and mind to the limit... those depths would remain outside my grasp."
        
        You cross your arms, letting her continue.
        
        "Uncompromising as I was, I became obsessed. I could not accept that it would remain something I could only look from afar... not even my father's warnings could dissuade me from attempting something idiotic... and so I did."
        
        You think you know where this is going. She almost drowned, didn't she?
        
        She nods again, sighing.
        
        "I wish I listened to him. I will never forget the awful, awful terror I felt when I could not breathe. I choked, begged forgiveness to whatever god could help me... luckily, that god was a Siorc who happened to swim by. When I woke up, I saw my father's eyes... they were full of relief, but struggling to contain his anger."
        
        [pc.dcb
            |The punishment must have been delightfully severe.
            |You can only imagine the fear he must have felt at the thought of losing his daughter.
            |You feel tearing up as your big heart sinks...
        ]
        
        "It was the first time in my life where I felt pure shame," she sighs, her eyes staring at her feet.
        
        "I spent a lot of time with that Siorc, a very good guy, and thanks to him I became aware of one thing: no matter what, there are some things that will always remain beyond our reach. Just like he couldn't reach the skies, I could not reach the depths; just like he could only marvel at those who could soar, I could only marvel at those who could dive." 
        
        She narrows her eyes, expressing resignation, but also awareness.
        
        "My father was thrilled to know that I learned my lesson... but less thrilled when he realized that I had given him something I could not give anyone else." 
        
        She taps her womb with her left hand, and you can't help but chuckle.
        
        "You can imagine what fathers want to do when they become grandfathers, but that Siorc left for the high seas before he could 'kindly' shake his hand. I never saw him again, but he will always have my gratitude for helping me grow."
rows.translation:
你难道从未见过这种三叉戟技巧与水系魔法相结合的攻击方式吗？她为什么要选择掌握这样的能力呢？

她将三叉戟架在肩上，嘴角绽放出真挚的微笑。

“我对大海的热爱，其实是在我学会飞行之后才逐渐形成的。
        
        她开始说话，转身面向水面。

“我早就告诉过你，对我来说，要终于展翅飞翔、征服蓝天是多么困难的一件事……当我真的做到了那一刻，我觉得整个世界都掌握在了我的手中。我当时觉得，没有什么是我做不到的，没有什么是我无法企及的，没有什么是我无法拥有的。
        
        除了大海，什么也没有，不是吗？

她点了点头，将武器重新放回地面。

“当我飞越无边无际的蓝色海浪时，我自然而然地产生了潜入水中的强烈欲望。当我俯视下方时，我看到一个充满未知与可能的世界——那里有各种谜团，有有着自己故事的沉船，还有我们几乎不了解的生命形式……我渴望到达那里；我想要像征服天空一样，征服这片海洋。
        
        福图娜的双眸坚如钢铁，其中燃烧着炽热的激情。

“我刻苦训练，让自己能够长时间屏住呼吸；我掌握了水魔法，以便更好地理解如何征服海洋；我还精通三叉戟的使用技巧，这样才能更有效地防御深渊中那些可能隐藏着致命危险的生物……但是，无论我如何将自己的身体和意志力推向极限，那些深处的秘密依然无法为我所知。
        
        你双臂交叉，让她继续说下去。

“尽管我一向坚持自己的原则，但我还是陷入了执念。我无法接受只能远远地注视它……就连我父亲的警告也无法阻止我去做那些愚蠢的事情……于是，我还是那么做了。
        
        你以为自己知道事情会如何发展。她差点淹死，对吧？

她再次点了点头，叹了口气。

“我真希望当初能听他的话。我永远忘不了当时无法呼吸时那种可怕的恐惧——我快要窒息了，拼命向任何能帮助我的神明祈求宽恕……幸运的是，那位神明正好是一位路过的水手。当我醒来时，我看到了我父亲的眼睛……里面充满了如释重负，但同时也隐藏着难以抑制的愤怒。
        
        [pc.dcb
            |这种惩罚肯定严厉到了令人愉悦的程度。
            |你只能想象，一想到可能会失去自己的女儿，他该有多恐惧。
            |当你那颗宽广的心陷入失落时，你感到泪水在眼眶中打转……
        ]
        
        那是我一生中第一次感到如此羞愧，”她叹息道，目光呆呆地盯着自己的脚。

“我和那个西奥克相处了很长时间，他是个非常好的人。多亏了他，我才意识到一件事：无论发生什么，总有一些东西是我们永远无法触及的。 就像他无法抵达天空，我也无法探索深渊；就像他只能羡慕那些能够翱翔的人，我也只能羡慕那些能够潜入深处的人。”

她眯起眼睛，眼中流露出无奈，但也带着一种清醒的认识。
        
        我父亲得知我吸取了教训后非常高兴……但当他发现我送给他的东西是别人给不了他的时候，他的高兴就减退了许多。”

她用左手轻拍着自己的腹部，你不禁会会心一笑。
        
        你可以想象，当父亲们成为祖父时，他们想要做些什么。但是那个Siorc在有机会与我握手道别之前，就踏上了远洋的航程。我再也没有见过他，但他帮助我成长，因此我将永远感激他。"

rows.original: You're not going to lie... this aquatic harpy is a stunning beauty that you would like to get more comfortable with. Stepping in closer, you slide your hand around her shoulder, your fingers dancing and gently touching her soft skin. As you reach her face, Fortuna grabs your hand with a lively, close-lipped smile. "Let's make this more interesting, shall we? A very simple card game I used to be really good at back when I was a kid." She winks at you, opening up a pouch hanging off her belt and grabbing three cards. Oh? She shows the cards to you: the first one is a knight holding a cup, the second one is a knight holding a sword and the third one represents a shiny coin. "If you can find the coin when I flip the cards down, you win; if you don't, you lose." Sounds interesting, especially if it's going to lead to even more fun times. You both sit down with your legs crossed as Fortuna shows you the cards, two in her right hand and the other one in the left. With one swift motion, she lets them fall face-down. "Go ahead... choose." You take a moment to ponder your options.
rows.translation: 你不会骗我的……这种水生女妖实在是美得令人窒息，你一定会想要和她更加亲近一些。当你慢慢靠近她时，你将手搭在她的肩上，手指轻轻滑动，轻轻触碰着她柔软的肌肤。 当你靠近她的脸时，福尔图娜露出一个活泼而嘴角紧抿的微笑，握住了你的手。 “让我们让这个游戏变得更有趣一些，好吗？这是一种非常简单的纸牌游戏，我小时候玩得可好了。” 她朝你眨了眨眼，然后打开挂在腰带上的小袋子，取出了三张纸牌。 哦？ 她把那些卡片拿给你看：第一张上是一个手持杯子的骑士，第二张上是一个手持剑的骑士，第三张则代表一枚闪亮的硬币。“如果我翻开卡片后你能找到那枚硬币，你就赢了；如果找不到，你就输了。听起来很有趣，尤其是如果这能带来更多的好处的话。 更有趣 几次之后， 你们俩盘腿而坐，福尔图娜将卡片展示在你们面前：右手拿两张，左手拿一张。她迅速地将它们翻面朝下。 “来吧……选择吧。” 你花了一点时间来思考自己的选择。

rows.original:
You smirk: you recognize the game she wants to play[pc.bg slumrat
            | from your days in the slums: it's the 'three-card trick'
        ]. It's a game of dexterity and optical illusion, where the focus is the hand that's holding the two cards. The order in which they fall down happens backwards to what it would appear, which means that the card held closer to the palm falls down first. This happens because the cards are not touching, but they are slightly far apart, just enough to have the viewer think the lower one fell first.
        
        [pc.bg slumrat
            |You also add that there's a variation of this game where the player always loses: if the correct card is guessed, the handler can quickly swap the winning card with another one they keep hidden. You'll see if that's the version she's playing once you select the winning card.
        ]
        
        You pick what you know is the correct card. Fortuna subtly nods, her mouth curling into an impressed smile.
        
        "Huh... hasn't happened in a long while... but it looks like my defeat is complete," she admits, flipping the card you chose and showing you the coin. 
        
        "Victory is yours... and as you might know, Longclaw Consortion law dictates that the winner shall take one thing of their choosing from the loser..." she says, scooping the cards and putting them back into her pouch. "So, what will it be?" she purrs, drinking every detail of your body as she leans closer.
rows.translation:
你露出一丝 smirk，因为你认出了她想玩的那款游戏。[pc.bg slumrat
            | 回想你在贫民区度过的那些日子，其实就是那个“三张牌把戏”。
        ]这是一款考验灵活性与视觉错觉的游戏，关键在于手持两张卡片的那只手。这两张卡片掉落的顺序与表面上看到的情况正好相反——实际上，离手掌更近的那张卡片会先掉落。之所以会出现这种效果，是因为这两张卡片并没有真正接触在一起，它们之间留有微小的距离，正是这个距离让观察者误以为下面那张卡片先掉了下来。
        
        [pc.bg slumrat
            |你还补充说，这个游戏还有一个变体，在这个变体中玩家总是会失败：如果玩家猜中了正确的卡片，游戏管理员就可以迅速将获胜的卡片换成另一张他们事先藏好的卡片。一旦你选中了获胜的卡片，你就会知道她玩的是不是这个变体了。
        ]
        
        你选择了自己认为正确的那张卡片。福图娜微微点头，嘴角露出一丝赞许的微笑。

“嗯……已经很久没有这种事了……不过看来，我的失败已经是不可避免的了，”她承认道，然后翻开了你选择的那张卡片，将硬币展示给了你。 
        
        胜利属于你……而且如你所知，长爪联盟的法则规定，胜者可以从败者手中选择一样东西……”她说着，将那些卡片收起来放回了自己的袋子里。“那么，你想要什么呢？她轻轻发出呼噜声，一边靠近你，一边仔细观察你身体的每一个细节。

        ]. It's a game of dexterity and optical illusion, where the focus is the hand that's holding the two cards. The order in which they fall down happens backwards to what it would appear, which means that the card held closer to the palm falls down first. This happens because the cards are not touching, but they are slightly far apart, just enough to have the viewer think the lower one fell first.
        
        [pc.bg slumrat

        ]
        
        You pick what you know is the correct card. Fortuna subtly nods, her mouth curling into an impressed smile.
        
        "Huh... hasn't happened in a long while... but it looks like my defeat is complete," she admits, flipping the card you chose and showing you the coin.

"So, what will it be?" she purrs, drinking every detail of your body as she leans closer."

rows.original:
Thanks to your keen reflexes, you could see something peculiar: with the way she moved her hands, it looked like she let the card closer to her palm slip down before the other. You're positive that an eye unable to distinguish such a fast movement would have lost the subtlety of this sleight of hand, leading them to defeat.

        You point at the card you saw falling first, having memorized that it was the one with the coin depicted on. Fortuna flips it up, showing that your eye was correct.
        
        "You seemed pretty confident about your choice... looks like you saw the trick," she admits with a smile, scooping up the cards and putting them back in her pouch.
        
        "As you might know... Longclaw Consortium law dictates that the winner shall take one thing of their choosing from the loser..." she leans in closer to you, licking her lips. "So... what will it be?" she purrs, her face curling into a seductive smile.
rows.translation:
多亏了你敏锐的反应能力，你才注意到这样一个细节：她移动双手的方式使得那张卡片在另一张卡片之前滑落到了自己的手掌中。你确信，如果眼睛无法分辨如此迅速的动作，就一定无法察觉到这种巧妙的手法，从而导致他们失败。

        你指出了那张你看到最先掉下来的卡片，因为你记得上面画着硬币的正是那张。Fortuna把它翻了过来，证明你的判断是正确的。

“你看起来对自己的选择相当有信心啊。看来你已经看穿了我的把戏了，”她微笑着承认道，然后将那些卡片收起来放回自己的袋子里。

“你可能也知道……长爪联盟的规矩规定，获胜者可以从失败者那里选择一样东西作为奖励。…”她凑近你，舔了舔嘴唇，低声说道：“那么……你想要什么呢？”她脸上浮现出迷人的微笑，声音轻柔得像是在低语。

[var0
            |You didn't notice anything peculiar in her hand movements, but it sure looks like that the oceanic harpy is intensely staring at your [pc.hasBoobs
                |boobs
                |chest
            ]. As much as she tries to hide it, you can see the hunger in eyes, almost as if she's filling her mind with the thousand ways she wants to have her way with you. Musing on what to choose, you notice that Fortuna's eyes are bouncing on two specific cards: the leftmost and the center ones, almost as if she's hoping for you to select one of the two. With a grin on your face, you pick the one she's not eyeing.
            
            "Tch... beginner's luck," she smiles, scooping the cards up after showing to you that it was the correct choice.
            
            Beginner's luck? Or is it because she frantically tried to make you select the wrong ones?
            
            She chuckles.
            
            "Guess I gave it away... I have a weakness for [pc.mf
                |handsome men
                |gorgeous women
            ], and sometimes I want to cut right to the chase."
            
            Oh, you know the feeling.
            
            "So... Longclaw Consortium's law dictates that the winner shall take one thing of their choosing from the loser..." she begins, licking her lips and cupping one of her breasts. "What will it be?"
            |You didn't notice anything peculiar in her hand movements, and you're pretty confident that you know what card will make you win. Fortuna flips it.

            Argh, it wasn't the coin.
            
            "Too bad, it's a loss... but it was a nice try," she commends, scooping the cards and putting them back in her pouch. 
            
            "Now... I think you know what comes next." 
            
            With a devilish grin, Fortuna gets on her feet.
        ]

            "Tch... beginner's luck," she smiles, scooping the cards up after showing to you that it was the correct choice.
            
            Beginner's luck? Or is it because she frantically tried to make you select the wrong ones?
            
            She chuckles.
            
            "Guess I gave it away... I have a weakness for [pc.mf
                |handsome men
                |gorgeous women
            ], and sometimes I want to cut right to the chase."
            
            Oh, you know the feeling.
            
            "So... Longclaw Consortium's law dictates that the winner shall take one thing of their choosing from the loser..." she begins, licking her lips and cupping one of her breasts. "What will it be?"
            |You didn't notice anything peculiar in her hand movements, and you're pretty confident that you know what card will make you win. Fortuna flips it.

            Argh, it wasn't the coin.
            
            "Too bad, it's a loss... but it was a nice try," she commends, scooping the cards and putting them back in her pouch. 
            
            "Now... I think you know what comes next." 
            
            With a devilish grin, Fortuna gets on her feet.
        ]
        "

rows.original:
Taking a couple of extra moments to reflect on what you want to do, you nod your head slightly, confident that you have figured the game out. Smacking your lips, you hover on what you know is the winning card, look Fortuna straight in the eye, however at the last moment you pick another.

        Fortuna grimaces, flipping the card you chose. "You did it on purpose, did you? Why would you throw away a perfectly good opportunity to win?"
        
        She squints her eyes, seeing right through you. 
        
        With a smile, you explain that while you knew what the game was all about, you are in the mood for something to be taken from you. Is she going to do anything about it? Or is she backing down?
        
        Fortuna shakes her head with a grin, her eyes firing up with playful and false anger. "I'll put you in your place."
rows.translation:
你多花了几秒钟时间仔细思考自己想要做什么，然后微微点了点头，确信自己已经弄明白了游戏的规则。你舔了舔嘴唇，将目光定在那张你认为能带来胜利的牌上，直视着Fortuna的眼睛，但在最后一刻，你却选择了另一张牌。

        福图娜皱了皱眉头，将你选中的那张卡片翻了过来。“你是故意这么做的，对吧？为什么要放弃这样一个绝佳的获胜机会呢？”

她眯起眼睛，仿佛看穿了你的一切。

你微笑着解释说，虽然你明白这个游戏的规则，但此刻你只是想让别人从你这里夺走些什么罢了。 她打算采取什么行动吗？还是打算放弃呢？

福图娜笑着摇了摇头，她的眼睛里闪烁着戏谑而虚假的愤怒：“我会让你知道谁才是老大。

rows.original:
You have taken an interest in her fighting style, which blends magic and polearm in one graceful but powerful set of techniques. If she doesn't mind... Can she teach you?

    "I can, but it won't be easy and it will take some time... and it'll cost you," she mentions, grabbing her trident with her hands. "I need to pay my daily share to the Consortium."
    
    You are able to cover up any expense, you are sure of that.
    
    She smiles, putting a little bit of distance between you.
    
    "Most of my techniques come from tomes smuggled by the Consortium's second in command, Sandro Serevare... He charged a small fortune every time, but it was worth it," she explains, taking a fighting stance. "Very well, let's begin."
    
    As she speaks, blue magical energy gathers around her, swirling around her body like a whirlpool. You feel the air around you get heavier and heavier after each breath... so that means that she's conjuring water?
    
    "Partially. The manipulation of water I master can effectively conjure water that answers to my will... but when my magic power is low, I can concentrate the moisture within the air itself until condensation. There's an old saying in the language Sandro speaks that translates to: 'In the sea, there are no taverns'... which means that the sea gives you no safe place. No matter how much you fight... you are at its mercy."
    
    A huge mass of water appears above you, taking the shape of a swirling sphere that continuously pours liquid down like a cloudburst.
    
    You ready your weapon: it looks like she intends to teach you the direct way.
rows.translation:
你对她那种将魔法与长柄武器结合在一起的战斗风格产生了兴趣，这套技巧既优雅又强大。如果她不介意的话……她能教你吗？

“我可以教你，但这并不容易，也需要一些时间……而且你得付出代价，”她边说边用手拿起了自己的三叉戟，“我需要向联盟缴纳我每天应缴纳的份额。
    
    你肯定有能力承担任何费用，对此你很有信心。

她微笑着，与你保持了一定的距离。

“我的大部分技巧都是从联盟副手桑德罗·塞雷瓦雷偷运进来的典籍中学到的……他每次收取的费用都很高，但确实值得，”她解释道，同时摆出了战斗姿势。“好吧，让我们开始吧。
    
    随着她的话语响起，蓝色的魔法能量开始在她周围聚集，如同漩涡一般在她的身躯周围旋转。你会感觉到周围的空气在每一次呼吸之后都变得越来越沉重……那么，这意味着她正在召唤水吗？

“部分是吧。 我掌握了对水元素的控制技巧，能够随心所欲地召唤出水来……但当我的魔力不足时，我也可以凝聚空气中的水分，使其凝结成水滴。在桑德罗使用的语言中，有句古老的谚语，意思是：“在大海之上，是没有酒馆的。这意味着海洋不会为你提供任何安全的地方。无论你如何抗争……你都只能任由它的摆布。
    
    一大片水出现在你的上方，它呈现出一个旋转的球体形态，不断地将水倾泻而下，就像一场暴雨一样。

你拿好了武器：看来她打算直接教你如何使用它。
rows.raw:
'
    You have taken an interest in her fighting style, which blends magic and polearm in one graceful but powerful set of techniques. If she doesn't mind... Can she teach you?

    "I can, but it won't be easy and it will take some time... and it'll cost you," she mentions, grabbing her trident with her hands. "I need to pay my daily share to the Consortium."

    "Partially. The manipulation of water I master can effectively conjure water that answers to my will... but when my magic power is low, I can concentrate the moisture within the air itself until condensation. There's an old saying in the language Sandro speaks that translates to: 'In the sea, there are no taverns'... which means that the sea gives you no safe place. No matter how much you fight... you are at its mercy."

rows.original: Train any powers that you are high enough level to use.
rows.translation: 当你达到足够的等级时，就可以使用这些能力了。
rows.raw: "Train any powers that you are high enough level to use."

rows.original:
You can't wait to crash out. Fortuna's methods are draining and intensive, but you got the hang of it rather quickly thanks to how often she was willing to repeat every notion and every movement. 

    Drained of every energy, you lay down on the small camp Fortuna has left for you, focused on getting some sleep.
rows.translation:
你迫不及待地想要休息。Fortuna的教学方法虽然耗时且强度较大，但因为她总是愿意反复讲解每一个概念和每一个动作，所以你很快就掌握了这些方法。

筋疲力尽之后，你躺在Fortuna为你准备的小营地里，一心只想睡一会儿。
rows.raw:
"
    You can't wait to crash out. Fortuna's methods are draining and intensive, but you got the hang of it rather quickly thanks to how often she was willing to repeat every notion and every movement. 

    Drained of every energy, you lay down on the small camp Fortuna has left for you, focused on getting some sleep."

rows.original:
Sighing, the harpy plants her trident into the ground, using it as leverage to sit on her knees.
        
        "I was wrong... you are indeed very skilled..." she admits, staggering back to her feet. Is she finally going to let you pass without a fight from now on?
        
        "I now know that your victories weren't a fluke. We respect strength and integrity, and by honoring the Longclaw Consortium's rules you've shown that you possess both," she commends with a smile.
        
        " 'What rends the waves of the sea?' 'The trident of Fortuna Zorba, daughter of Adriano Zorba.' "
        
        As she hovers, ready to fly away, you ask her to wait — you want to introduce yourself.
        
        She turns back with a faint smile, and gives you a slight, but approving nod.
        
        "A pleasure to meet you, [pc.name]," she says, landing on the ground in front of you.
        
        "I can stop for a while before the rest of my group catches up... do you want to know anything?"
        
        How will you spend your time with Fortuna?
rows.translation:
叹息着，这个女妖将她的三叉戟插入地面，借其作为支撑，跪在了地上。

“我错了……你确实非常擅长这个……”她承认道，踉跄着站了起来。从现在开始，她终于会让你顺利通过而不加阻拦了吗？
        
        现在我明白了，你们的胜利绝非偶然。我们尊重力量与诚信，而你们遵守长爪联盟的规则，恰恰证明了你们具备这两点。”她微笑着称赞道。

“是什么在激起海浪的汹涌？阿德里亚诺·佐尔巴的女儿——幸运之佐尔巴的三叉戟。”

当她悬停在半空中，准备飞走时，你请求她稍等片刻，你想先自我介绍一下。

她转过身来，脸上带着淡淡的微笑，轻轻点了点头，表示同意。
        
        很高兴见到您， [pc.name]我可以在我的团队其他人追上来之前先休息一会儿……你有什么想知道的吗？”

你会如何利用与Fortuna相处的这段时间呢？

        "I now know that your victories weren't a fluke. We respect strength and integrity, and by honoring the Longclaw Consortium's rules you've shown that you possess both," she commends with a smile.
        
        " 'What rends the waves of the sea?' 'The trident of Fortuna Zorba, daughter of Adriano Zorba.' "

        "A pleasure to meet you, [pc.name]," she says, landing on the ground in front of you.
        
        "I can stop for a while before the rest of my group catches up... do you want to know anything?"
        
        How will you spend your time with Fortuna?'

rows.original:
The damage you sustained during the fight is too great for you to remain on your feet. You crumble, falling on your hands and knees, gasping for air. You try to regain your footing, but you can't put any weight on your legs.

    "An impressive show of your abilities, but it wasn't enough."
    
    The aquatic harpy lowers her weapon[party.som
        |
        | and dismisses the water elemental she conjured
        | and dismisses the water elementals she conjured
    ], closing the distance as you roll on your back — you have lost.
rows.translation:
你在战斗中受到的伤害实在太严重了，已经无法继续站立。你瘫软下来，双手双膝着地，喘着粗气。你试图重新站稳，但双腿却完全使不上力。

“你的表现确实令人印象深刻，但还不够。”

那头水生女妖放下了她的武器。[party.som
        |
        | 并驱散了她所召唤的水元素。
        | 并驱散了她所召唤的水元素生物。
    ]当你仰面翻滚时，距离正在逐渐缩短——你已经输了。
rows.raw:
"
    The damage you sustained during the fight is too great for you to remain on your feet. You crumble, falling on your hands and knees, gasping for air. You try to regain your footing, but you can't put any weight on your legs.

    "An impressive show of your abilities, but it wasn't enough."
    
    The aquatic harpy lowers her weapon[party.som
        |
        | and dismisses the water elemental she conjured
        | and dismisses the water elementals she conjured
    ], closing the distance as you roll on your back — you have lost."

rows.original:
During the fight, you couldn't help but notice how well-built she is... So, one thing of their choosing from the loser? You have a clear idea of what you want from this sexy bird.

    "Heh... that look in your eyes... It seems that you made your decision,haven't you?" the harpy begins, a jaunty smile on her lips. Perceptive, isn't she?
    
    "Do not waver. You don't want to give me the time to rest and counterattack, do you?"
    
    You chuckle: spoken like someone who wants to get straight down to business.
    
    You kneel in front of her, cupping her face with your hands. She doesn't raise a finger, opting to look at you straight in the eye.
    
    "Do me however you want."
    
    She's taking her defeat a little bit too gleefully — it's time to show her who's in charge.
rows.translation:
在战斗中，你不得不注意到她的身材是多么的好……那么，作为失败者，他们可以选择的东西之一，就是这个性感的女人吧？你肯定已经清楚自己想要什么了。

“呵呵……你眼中的那种眼神……看来你已经做出了决定，对吧？那个女妖开口了，嘴角挂着轻快的笑容。真是个敏锐的人啊，不是吗？

“不要犹豫。你肯定不想给我机会休息然后反击，对吧？”

你轻笑出声：这话听起来就像是一个想立刻进入正题的人说的。
    
    你跪在她面前，用双手捧起她的脸。她没有动一下手指，而是选择直视你的眼睛。

“你想怎么对我都行。”

她接受失败的样子似乎太过开心了——是时候让她知道谁才是真正的主人了。
rows.raw:
"
    During the fight, you couldn't help but notice how well-built she is... So, one thing of their choosing from the loser? You have a clear idea of what you want from this sexy bird.

    "Heh... that look in your eyes... It seems that you made your decision,haven't you?" the harpy begins, a jaunty smile on her lips. Perceptive, isn't she?
    
    "Do not waver. You don't want to give me the time to rest and counterattack, do you?"
    
    You chuckle: spoken like someone who wants to get straight down to business.
    
    You kneel in front of her, cupping her face with your hands. She doesn't raise a finger, opting to look at you straight in the eye.
    
    "Do me however you want."
    
    She's taking her defeat a little bit too gleefully — it's time to show her who's in charge."

rows.original:
Licking your lips, your objective is set in stone: if you can take whatever you want from this ravishing bird, her amazing body will be the perfect toll she's going to pay for standing in your way.

    As you walk towards the sea harpy, she falls on all fours, and her weapon crashes to the ground with a metallic thud. 
    
    "You've made your choice, huh? Can't blame you... it's the best way to put me out of commission for a little longer," she chuckles, steeling her body for what's to come. "Come on, then... or do you prefer that I regain my strength and proceed with a tactical retreat?" 
    
    You kneel beside her, gently pulling her hair backwards to drink in every detail of her beautiful face. 
    
    "Do me however you want," she goads, her eyes glinting with mischievousness. 
    
    You grin: you're going to show her who's in charge.
rows.translation:
你舔了舔嘴唇，目标已经明确：如果你能从这个迷人的女子身上得到任何你想要的东西，她那令人惊叹的身体，就是她阻碍你前进所必须付出的代价。

当你走向那只海妖女时，她突然四肢着地趴在了地上，她的武器也随着一声金属撞击声掉在了地上。 
    
    你已经做出了选择，是吧？也不能怪你……这样确实能让我在一段时间内无法继续行动，”她轻笑着，同时做好了迎接接下来发生的事情的准备。“那好吧……还是说你希望我恢复力量，然后采取战术性撤退呢？你跪在她身旁，轻轻地将她的头发拨到身后，仔细端详她那美丽的面容。

“你想怎么对我都行，”她挑衅地说道，眼中闪烁着调皮的光芒。

你笑了——你一定要让她知道，谁才是真正的主宰者。
rows.raw:
"
    Licking your lips, your objective is set in stone: if you can take whatever you want from this ravishing bird, her amazing body will be the perfect toll she's going to pay for standing in your way.

    As you walk towards the sea harpy, she falls on all fours, and her weapon crashes to the ground with a metallic thud. 
    
    "You've made your choice, huh? Can't blame you... it's the best way to put me out of commission for a little longer," she chuckles, steeling her body for what's to come. "Come on, then... or do you prefer that I regain my strength and proceed with a tactical retreat?" 
    
    You kneel beside her, gently pulling her hair backwards to drink in every detail of her beautiful face. 
    
    "Do me however you want," she goads, her eyes glinting with mischievousness. 
    
    You grin: you're going to show her who's in charge."

rows.original:
[pc.dcb
        |With a smirk, you admit that giving her a nice thrashing was all you needed.
        |You were just defending yourself, you aren't interested in taking anything from her.
        |You pout: she shouldn't be such a big fat meanie to passersby! You just wanted her to see it.
    ]
    
    She grits her teeth, trying to force herself back to a standing position.
    
    "Tch... doing the nice thing? This is not how the battlefield works; take what you've earned!"
    
    She yelps in pain, falling back on her knees while attempting to conjure her water magic. You will rephrase, then: you have earned your right to move past her, and that's what you'll take from her.
    
    The harpy remains silent for a few moments, then breaks into a smirk.
    
    "You'll be the poorest nice [pc.mf
        |guy
        |gal
    ], if you never seize the opportunity... but the world needs nice people."
    
    She nods, getting back on her feet and allowing you to move on.
rows.translation:
[pc.dcb
        |你坏笑着承认，其实你只是想好好教训她一顿而已。
        |你只是在自卫而已，并没有想要从她那里得到任何东西。
        |你撅着嘴想：她真不应该对路人这么刻薄、这么恶毒！你只是想让她看到而已。
    ]
    
    她咬紧牙关，努力让自己重新站起来。

“啧……想做好事吗？战场可不是这么运作的；你得到的就是你应得的！”

她痛苦地叫了一声，又跪了下去，同时试图施展水系魔法。你可以这样重新表述：你已经赢得了从她身边通过的资格，而这就是你应得的东西。

那个女妖沉默了一会儿，然后露出了一丝讥讽的笑容。

“你未免太天真了…… [pc.mf
        |伙计

rows.original: "Want to know something, [pc.title]?" She leisurely begins to circle you, trailing a hand over your body as she blatantly looks you over. Her hooves clop against the ground with each step and her tail curls up to caress your chin before flicking away. "Us sisters tell each other everything. This is the third time in a row that you've lost to one of us. Some of us are starting to think you're doing this on purpose." You open your mouth to protest but she shoves two armored fingers in your mouth, squeezing your tongue between them and preventing you from saying anything. Coming to a stop and crossing her arms, a wicked grin spreads her lips. "We could give you to Kasyrra like we'd originally planned; it'd certainly earn us her favor, but... some of us really don't want to lose our favorite fuck-toy, you know? So I'm gonna take you back to our encampment and you're going to spend the rest of your days being our little pet." Taking advantage of her demonic shape-shifting, her tail increases in length and strength, wrapping around you and gripping you tightly. Large wings emerge from her back where previously there had been none. Dust and sand kick up when she flaps her wings, lifting the two of you into the air and sending you both rocketing into the sky. [party.som |Alone, no one will know you're missing until it's too late. |[companion1.name] screams your name as you're carried away by the demonic succubus. |[companion1.name] and [companion2.name] scream your name as you're carried away by the demonic succubus. ] The scenery blurs past you as your captor soars over the coastlands, hurtling towards a large campsite neatly hidden away. Landing in the center next to a cleverly constructed high-sided campfire, she calls out to the other demons. "Girls! I brought a gift for us." The demon uncurls her tail from around your body, dropping you onto the ground in front of a decently sized congregation of ex-Tiran succubi. "Where's Kitana? She'll want to know that the [pc.title] she pegged as the perfect toy for us has arrived." One of the succubi strides forward — the very first one you'd met, now identified as Kitana — and greets your captor with a firm embrace. The way the others part and hover around her make it obvious that she's clearly the one in charge around here. "What a lovely job you've done, Rani." Pulling back, she stalks towards you, grinning at your unmoving body. The coos, jeers and titters from the girls standing around you make you feel like a carcass of meat just presented to an untrained pack of feral wolves. The feeling only grows when Kitani pulls a vial of suspicious liquid from one of the pouches at her waist, shaking it tauntingly. When she pops the cork and the smell reaches you, you know exactly what this demon is about to pour on you. Wyvern venom. "Ah, so you know exactly what this is." She grins. "Starting today, we're going to train you to be the perfect pet for us. When you're good, you'll get a reward — food, privileges, nice things... sexual release — and when you're bad, you'll be deprived of those things. I wonder how long you'll last being unable to cum or even touch yourself, yet so hopped up on aphrodisiacs that nothing else matters." She tips your head back and pries your jaw open, upending the entire bottle down your throat. As it slides into a gut, you can just barely hear what the demon says beyond the fire igniting throughout your entire body. "I look forward to seeing your progress, [pc.title]."

    ]他将刀刃调整到最佳状态，随时准备行动。

“别担心， [pc.name]这个交给我吧。”

他动作迅速，用一个流畅而熟练的动作将恶魔刺穿了胸膛。用布擦了擦剑刃上的血迹，他便重新回到你身边，准备听从你的指挥。
rows.raw:
'
    Your bunny [quin.married
        |husband
        |companion
    ] steps forward at your [pc.isDK
        |demand
        |request
    ], angling his blade at the ready.
    
    "No worries, [pc.name]; I've got this."
    
    He makes quick work of the demon, spearing her through the chest with one smooth, skillful movement. Wiping the blade of blood with a cloth, he rejoins you at your side, ready to follow your lead.
    '

rows.original:
You aren't interested in what she has to offer at the moment.
    
    [party.som
        |You
        |You and [companion1.name]
        |You and your companions
    ] take your leave, leaving the demonic paladin behind on the ground to deal with her little problem on her own.
